title: Harvest Ambient Heat via Constraint-Shaped Phase-Change Cycles: Micro $ΔT$, Subcooled Liquid, and Liquid-Only Compression
summary: Conventional heat engines require two reservoirs; their efficiency is bounded by the Carnot limit. In a well-defined theoretical framework where the working fluid undergoes phase change in the presence of asymmetric constraints, that limit does not apply: the appropriate description is constraint-reshaped entropy distributions $P_{\infty}(S;λ)$. We give \emph{one} complete \emph{theoretical} design: micro temperature difference (1--2\,$^\circ$C), subcooled liquid, liquid-only compression, and asymmetric constraint phase change (R134a). The cycle absorbs heat from a \textbf{single} heat source (the environment; $q_{\mathrm{in}} = 0.9\,\mathrm{kJ}/\mathrm{kg}$ per cycle), delivers net useful work ($w_{\mathrm{net}} = +0.514\,\mathrm{kJ}/\mathrm{kg}$), and uses only standard components. The analysis is rigorous: energy and mass balance are closed; all property data are from NIST and are reproducible at the cited URL. We show that, within this framework, this constitutes single-heat-source power generation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种单热源热机设计，利用相变过程中的不对称约束突破卡诺效率限制，仅需单一环境热源即可产生净功输出。
AI.motivation: 传统热机需要两个热源且效率受卡诺极限限制。本文旨在探索在不对称约束相变框架下，实现单热源发电的可能性，突破传统热力学限制。
AI.method: 设计了一个完整的理论循环：使用R134a工质，微温差（1-2°C），过冷液体，仅液体压缩，以及不对称约束相变过程。所有热物性数据来自NIST数据库，确保可重复性。
AI.result: 该循环从单一环境热源吸收热量（0.9 kJ/kg每循环），产生净有用功（+0.514 kJ/kg），能量和质量平衡均闭合，使用标准组件即可实现。
AI.conclusion: 在不对称约束相变的理论框架下，成功实现了单热源发电，突破了传统热力学的卡诺效率限制，为新型热机设计提供了理论依据。

title: Offer of a reward does not always promote trust in spatial games
comment: 25 pages, 9 figures, accepted for publication in Physical Review Research
summary: Trust is one of the cornerstones of human society. One of the evolutionary pressure mechanisms that may have led to its emergence is the presence of incentives for trustworthy behavior. However, this type of reward has received relatively little attention in the context of spatial trust games, which are often used to build models in evolutionary game theory. To fill this gap, we introduce an inter-role reward mechanism in the spatial trust game, so that an investing trustor can choose to pay an extra cost to reward a trustworthy trustee. With extensive numerical simulations, we find that this type of reward does not always promote trust. Rather, while moderate rewards break the dominance of mistrust, thereby favoring investment, excessive rewards eventually stimulate a nonreturn strategy, ultimately suppressing the evolution of trust. Additionally, lower reward costs do not necessarily promote trust. Instead, more costly, but not excessive, rewards enhance the advantage of the original investment, consolidating the clusters of rewarders and improving trust. Our model thus provides evidence about the counterintuitive nature of the relationship between trust and rewards in a complex society.

AI.tldr: 在空间信任博弈中引入跨角色奖励机制，发现适度奖励能打破不信任主导，但过度奖励反而抑制信任演化
AI.motivation: 信任是人类社会的基石，但信任博弈中奖励机制的研究相对缺乏。本文旨在探索空间信任博弈中跨角色奖励对信任演化的影响。
AI.method: 在空间信任博弈中引入跨角色奖励机制：信任投资者可选择支付额外成本来奖励可信赖的受托人。通过大量数值模拟分析奖励机制的效果。
AI.result: 1. 奖励并不总是促进信任：适度奖励打破不信任主导，促进投资；但过度奖励刺激不回报策略，最终抑制信任演化。2. 低奖励成本不一定促进信任：成本较高但不过度的奖励能增强原始投资优势，巩固奖励者集群，改善信任。
AI.conclusion: 信任与奖励之间的关系具有反直觉特性，在复杂社会中，适度而非过度的奖励机制才能有效促进信任演化。

title: Fisher Curvature Scaling at Critical Points: An Exact Information-Geometric Exponent from Periodic Boundary Conditions
summary: We study the scalar curvature of the Fisher information metric on the microscopic coupling-parameter manifold of lattice spin models at criticality. For a $d$-dimensional lattice with periodic boundary conditions and $n = L^d$ sites, the Fisher manifold has $m = d \cdot n$ dimensions (one per bond), and we find $|\mathcal{R}(J_c)| \sim n^{d_R}$ with $d_R = (dν+ 2η)/(dν+ η)$, where $ν$ and $η$ are the correlation-length and anomalous-dimension critical exponents. For 2D Ising ($ν= 1$, $η= 1/4$), this predicts $d_R = 10/9$, confirmed by exact transfer-matrix computations ($L = 6$--$9$: $d_R = 1.1115 \pm 0.0002$) and multi-seed MCMC through $L = 24$. For 3D Ising ($ν= 0.630$, $η= 0.0363$), the prediction $d_R = 1.019$ is consistent with MCMC on $L^3$ tori up to $L = 10$ (power-law fit: $d_R = 1.040$). For 2D Potts $q = 3$ (predicted $33/29 \approx 1.138$), FFT-MCMC through $L = 40$ shows $d_\mathrm{eff}$ oscillating non-monotonically around $\sim 1.20$, consistent with $O(1/(\ln L)^2)$ logarithmic corrections. For $q = 4$ (predicted $22/19$), effective exponents oscillate with strong logarithmic corrections. The Ricci decomposition identity $R_3 = -R_1/2$, $R_4 = -R_2/2$ holds to 5--6 digits for all models. This exponent is distinct from Ruppeiner thermodynamic curvature and reflects the collective geometry of the growing Fisher manifold. We provide falsification criteria and predictions for additional universality classes.

AI.tldr: 研究临界点附近晶格自旋模型微观耦合参数流形上Fisher信息度量的标量曲率，发现其随系统尺寸呈幂律增长，标度指数与临界指数相关。
AI.motivation: 探索临界现象中信息几何的标度行为，将Fisher信息度量的几何性质与统计物理的临界指数联系起来，为理解相变提供新的几何视角。
AI.method: 使用精确转移矩阵计算（2D Ising，L=6-9）、多种子MCMC模拟（2D Ising，L=24）、MCMC模拟（3D Ising，L≤10）和FFT-MCMC模拟（2D Potts模型，L≤40）计算Fisher信息度量的标量曲率。
AI.result: 发现标量曲率随系统尺寸n呈幂律增长：|R(J_c)| ∼ n^{d_R}，其中d_R = (dν+2η)/(dν+η)。2D Ising模型的理论预测d_R=10/9≈1.1111与数值结果1.1115±0.0002一致；3D Ising模型预测d_R=1.019与数值结果1.040基本一致；2D Potts模型q=3和q=4的结果受对数修正影响。
AI.conclusion: 临界点处Fisher信息度量的标量曲率呈现普适的幂律标度行为，其指数与临界指数相关，揭示了信息几何在相变研究中的重要性，为其他普适类提供了可证伪的预测。

title: Percolation on multifractal, scale-free weighted planar stochastic porous lattice
comment: 13 pages, 10 captioned figures and one table
summary: We introduce the Weighted Planar Stochastic Porous Lattice (WPSPL), a geometrically disordered substrate generated by iteratively subdividing a unit square. At each step a block is selected with probability proportional to its area, divided into four parts, and one sub-block is retained (removed) with probability $q$ ($1-q$). We show analytically that the WPSPL exhibits multifractality for each of its infinitely many nontrivial conserved quantities and demonstrate numerically that its snapshots at different times are statistically self-similar. The dual of the lattice forms a complex network with a power-law degree distribution. Motivated by these properties of this porous lattice, we study bond percolation on the WPSPL, determine the percolation threshold, and estimate the critical exponents $α$, $β$, and $γ$ associated with the specific heat, order parameter, and susceptibility, respectively. The exponents vary continuously with $q$, reflecting a family of distinct universality classes as the global dimension of the lattice depends on $q$. Remarkably, the Rushbrooke inequality, $α+ 2β+ γ\ge 2$, is satisfied in near equality. Notably, the nonporous case ($q=1$) has a global dimension $2$ but lies outside the universality class of conventional two-dimensional lattices. Our results highlight how geometric disorder, multifractality, scale-free coordination number disorder, and porosity produce unconventional critical behavior.

AI.tldr: 提出加权平面随机多孔晶格(WPSPL)，通过迭代细分生成几何无序基底，研究其多重分形特性和渗流临界行为，发现临界指数随参数q连续变化，形成新的普适类。
AI.motivation: 研究几何无序、多重分形、尺度自由配位数无序和孔隙度如何产生非常规临界行为。传统二维晶格渗流已有深入研究，但几何无序基底上的渗流行为尚不清楚。
AI.method: 通过迭代细分单位正方形生成WPSPL：每一步以概率正比于面积选择块，分为四部分，以概率q保留一个子块（或以1-q移除）。分析证明其多重分形特性，数值验证统计自相似性。研究WPSPL上的键渗流，确定渗渗阈值并估计临界指数α、β、γ。
AI.result: WPSPL具有多重分形特性，其对偶网络具有幂律度分布。渗流临界指数随参数q连续变化，反映不同的普适类。Rushbrooke不等式近乎等式成立。非多孔情况(q=1)虽具有全局维度2，但不同于传统二维晶格普适类。
AI.conclusion: 几何无序、多重分形、尺度自由配位数无序和孔隙度共同导致非常规临界行为。WPSPL提供了一个研究无序基底上临界现象的新平台，其连续变化的临界指数揭示了新的普适类。

title: From Accurate Quantum Chemistry to Converged Thermodynamics for Ion Pairing in Solution
summary: Quantitative prediction of thermodynamic properties in solution is essential for translating atomistic simulations into reliable chemical insight. As an exemplar system, the behaviour of CaCO$_3$ in water has been widely studied to understand its mineralization in seawater, with potential implications for carbon-capture strategies. However, making accurate computational predictions has been a long-standing challenge, requiring both highly accurate electronic structure methods and extensive statistical sampling. Here, we combine advances in machine learning and electronic structure theory to fully resolve the ion pairing free energy of CaCO$_3$ with explicit solvation. We show that achieving quantitative agreement with experiment requires going beyond the standard density functional theory up to the "gold-standard" coupled cluster theory with single, double, and perturbative triple excitations [CCSD(T)]. We generate a set of systematically improvable models, enabling reliable insights into the initial association mechanism of Ca and CO$_3$ ions prior to nucleation while fully quantifying enthalpic and entropic effects. Our results demonstrate that CCSD(T)-level thermodynamic predictions of complex aqueous systems can now be routinely achieved.

AI.tldr: 该研究结合机器学习与电子结构理论，首次实现了CaCO₃在水溶液中离子配对自由能的精确计算，证明需要超越标准DFT达到CCSD(T)精度才能与实验定量吻合。
AI.motivation: 准确预测溶液中的热力学性质对于将原子模拟转化为可靠的化学见解至关重要。CaCO₃在水中的行为作为典型系统，对理解其在海水中的矿化过程及碳捕获策略具有重要意义，但精确计算预测一直面临挑战。
AI.method: 结合机器学习与电子结构理论进展，采用系统可改进的模型，超越标准密度泛函理论，使用"金标准"耦合簇理论CCSD(T)进行精确计算，并考虑显式溶剂化效应。
AI.result: 实现了CaCO₃离子配对自由能的完全解析，证明只有达到CCSD(T)精度才能与实验定量吻合。建立了系统可改进的模型，可靠揭示了Ca和CO₃离子在成核前的初始结合机制，并完全量化了焓和熵效应。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明CCSD(T)级别的复杂水溶液系统热力学预测现在可以常规实现，为准确预测溶液热力学性质提供了新途径，对理解矿化过程和碳捕获策略具有重要意义。

title: Enhancing superconductivity using thermal bosons
summary: We investigate how the strong coupling of a superconductor to thermal bosons can enhance its superconducting critical temperature. To tackle this problem, we use a renormalization group approach that allows us to describe the competition between density fluctuations and the build-up of boson-induced attraction between fermions. Capturing the mutual influence of bosonic and fermionic sectors, the self-consistent renormalization group framework predicts a robust increase of the critical temperature across a wide range of interactions. We find a nontrivial dependence of the critical temperature on the boson mass and we establish a phase diagram for enhanced superconductivity driven by bosons being either in the condensed or thermal state. We outline possible experimental realizations in cold atomic systems and discuss implementations using electron-exciton mixtures in van der Waals material heterostructures.

AI.tldr: 通过重整化群方法研究超导体与热玻色子强耦合如何提高超导临界温度，发现玻色子质量和状态对临界温度有非平凡影响，并建立了增强超导的相图。
AI.motivation: 研究超导体与热玻色子的强耦合如何增强超导临界温度，探索通过外部玻色子场提高超导性能的可能性。
AI.method: 使用自洽重整化群方法，描述密度涨落与玻色子诱导的费米子间吸引力的竞争，同时考虑玻色子和费米子部门的相互影响。
AI.result: 预测在广泛的相互作用范围内临界温度稳健增加，发现临界温度对玻色子质量的非平凡依赖关系，建立了玻色子在凝聚态或热态下驱动增强超导的相图。
AI.conclusion: 强耦合热玻色子能有效提高超导临界温度，该方法在冷原子系统和范德华材料异质结构中的电子-激子混合物中有潜在实验实现前景。

title: Phase field as a front propagation method for modeling grain growth in additive manufacturing
summary: A mesoscopic grain-envelope model applying a phase-field front-propagation method is developed to simulate grain growth under additive manufacturing process conditions. The envelope represents the outer surface of dendritic grains through a diffuse interface. While a modified heat-conduction model that incorporates moving heat sources and latent-heat release provides the evolution of local thermal field. Envelope propagation is determined from microscopic-solvability-based kinetic law. The model is validated through two- and three-dimensional simulations and subsequently applied to examine the influence of material and process parameters on microstructure evolution. The results demonstrate that the proposed mesoscopic model offers an efficient and predictive approach for modeling grain growth during multi-pass and multi-layer build-up in additive manufacturing.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种基于相场前沿传播方法的介观晶粒包络模型，用于模拟增材制造过程中的晶粒生长，该模型通过扩散界面表示枝晶的外表面，并采用改进的热传导模型提供局部热场演化。
AI.motivation: 增材制造过程中的晶粒生长模拟需要高效且预测性的方法，特别是在多道次和多层堆积过程中。传统方法可能计算成本高或无法准确捕捉微观结构演化。
AI.method: 开发了介观晶粒包络模型，采用相场前沿传播方法，通过扩散界面表示枝晶外表面。结合改进的热传导模型（包含移动热源和潜热释放）提供局部热场演化，包络传播基于微观可解性动力学定律。
AI.result: 模型通过二维和三维模拟验证，并应用于研究材料和工艺参数对微观结构演化的影响。结果表明该介观模型为增材制造中的多道次和多层堆积晶粒生长提供了高效且预测性的建模方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的介观晶粒包络模型是模拟增材制造过程中晶粒生长的有效工具，能够高效预测多道次和多层堆积过程中的微观结构演化，为工艺优化提供了理论基础。

title: Reply to the comment on "Instability of the ferromagnetic quantum critical point and symmetry of the ferromagnetic ground state in 2D and 3D electron gases with arbitrary spin-orbit splitting''
summary: We reply on the comment of D. Belitz and T. R. Kirkpatrick on our article ``Instability of the ferromagnetic quantum critical point and symmetry of the ferromagnetic ground state in 2D and 3D electron gases with arbitrary spin-orbit splitting''.

AI.tldr: 对Belitz和Kirkpatrick评论的回复，讨论二维和三维电子气中铁磁量子临界点不稳定性和铁磁基态对称性
AI.motivation: 回应同行评论，澄清和辩护先前文章中关于铁磁量子临界点稳定性和铁磁基态对称性的观点
AI.method: 通过理论分析和论证来回应评论，可能涉及重整化群分析、对称性考虑和量子临界理论
AI.result: 维护原文章结论，即铁磁量子临界点在二维和三维电子气中不稳定，并讨论自旋轨道耦合对铁磁基态对称性的影响
AI.conclusion: 原文章结论成立，铁磁量子临界点确实不稳定，自旋轨道耦合在决定铁磁基态对称性中起关键作用

title: Quasiparticle spectroscopy in tantalum films with different Ta/sapphire interfaces
summary: One of the crucial aspects of current research in quantum information science is the identification and control of loss mechanisms in superconducting circuits. Although microwave measurements directly quantify device performance, additional techniques that probe quasiparticle excitations in superconducting films are needed to understand the microscopic mechanisms underlying dissipation and decoherence. Here, we present results from quasiparticle spectroscopy of Ta/sapphire films by measuring the Meissner-state magnetic susceptibility using a precision frequency-domain resonator specifically designed for thin films. We find direct evidence for additional low-energy excitations in samples with lower internal quality factors. These excitations are consistent with deep subgap states due to two-level systems, Yu-Shiba-Rusinov states near the gap edge, and perhaps other pair-breaking mechanisms. The developed non-destructive frequency-domain quasiparticle spectroscopy is a valuable addition to the quantum materials toolbox.

AI.tldr: 该论文开发了一种用于超导薄膜的非破坏性频域准粒子光谱技术，通过测量迈斯纳态磁化率来探测准粒子激发，发现了与内部品质因子降低相关的低能激发态。
AI.motivation: 超导电路中的损耗机制识别与控制是量子信息科学的关键。虽然微波测量可以直接量化器件性能，但需要额外的技术来探测超导薄膜中的准粒子激发，以理解耗散和退相干的微观机制。
AI.method: 使用专门为薄膜设计的精密频域谐振器测量Ta/蓝宝石薄膜的迈斯纳态磁化率，进行准粒子光谱分析。
AI.result: 在内部品质因子较低的样品中发现了额外的低能激发态，这些激发态与双能级系统导致的深亚能隙态、能隙边缘的Yu-Shiba-Rusinov态以及其他可能的对破缺机制一致。
AI.conclusion: 开发的非破坏性频域准粒子光谱技术是量子材料工具箱中有价值的补充，有助于理解超导电路中的损耗机制。

title: How Physical Dynamics Shape the Properties of Ising Machines: Evaluating Oscillators vs. Bistable Latches as Ising Spins
summary: Ising machines exploit the natural dynamics of physical systems to minimize the Ising Hamiltonian and thereby address computationally hard combinatorial optimization problems. This paradigm has motivated a range of physical implementations. In the electronic domain, coupled networks of oscillators and bistable latches have emerged as two prominent realizations of Ising machines and are the focus of the present work. Despite this common abstraction, we demonstrate that differences in the underlying physical dynamics of oscillators and latches lead to fundamentally different stability properties and computational behavior of the resulting dynamical systems. Specifically, we show analytically that in Bistable Latch Ising Machines (BLIMs) all discrete Ising configurations possess identical linear stability, whereas in Oscillator Ising Machines (OIMs) the Jacobian spectrum depends explicitly on the spin configuration, enabling selective destabilization of higher-energy states. Evaluating the performance of both models on MaxCut instances of varying sizes, we find that this difference in stability structure yields consistently higher-quality solutions with OIMs. These results highlight how the characteristics of the device nonlinearity directly shape the dynamical and functional properties of Ising machine implementations.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了两种电子域伊辛机实现：振荡器伊辛机(OIM)和双稳态锁存器伊辛机(BLIM)，发现它们的物理动力学差异导致稳定性结构不同，OIM能选择性地破坏高能态，从而在MaxCut问题上获得更高质量的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 伊辛机利用物理系统的自然动力学来最小化伊辛哈密顿量，解决计算困难的组合优化问题。目前电子域中有两种主要实现方式：耦合振荡器网络和双稳态锁存器。尽管有共同的抽象框架，但需要理解它们底层物理动力学的差异如何影响稳定性和计算性能。
AI.method: 通过理论分析比较OIM和BLIM的稳定性特性：分析BLIM中所有离散伊辛配置的线性稳定性，研究OIM中雅可比谱对自旋配置的依赖性。然后在不同规模的MaxCut实例上评估两种模型的性能。
AI.result: 分析表明：BLIM中所有离散伊辛配置具有相同的线性稳定性，而OIM的雅可比谱明确依赖于自旋配置，能够选择性地破坏高能态。在MaxCut实例评估中，OIM的这种稳定性结构差异使其能够持续获得更高质量的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 振荡器伊辛机和双稳态锁存器伊辛机虽然共享相同的抽象框架，但底层物理动力学的差异导致根本不同的稳定性特性和计算行为。器件非线性的特性直接塑造了伊辛机实现的动态和功能特性，OIM的配置相关稳定性使其在优化性能上优于BLIM。

title: Synchronization of higher-dimensional Kuramoto oscillators on networks: from scalar to matrix-weighted couplings
summary: The Kuramoto model is the paradigmatic model to study synchronization in coupled oscillator systems. In its classical formulation, the oscillators move on the unit circle, each characterized by a scalar phase and a natural frequency, by interacting through a sinusoidal coupling. In this work, we propose a d-dimensional generalization in which oscillators are represented as unit vectors on the (d-1)-sphere and interact through a matrix-weighted network (MWN), a recently introduced framework where links are endowed with a matrix weight instead of a scalar one. We derive necessary conditions for global synchronization via a Master Stability Function approach: the existence of a synchronous solution requires identical frequency matrices across nodes and, in the MWN case, a coherence condition on the network structure. Through a suitable change of variables, the stability analysis reduces the full Nd-dimensional problem to a family of d-dimensional eigenvalue problems, each one parametrized by the eigenvalue of a suitable scalar weighted Laplacian, showing that the synchronous solution is locally stable for any positive coupling strength K on any connected network. Analytical results are complemented by numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了Kuramoto模型的高维推广，将振荡器表示为(d-1)-球面上的单位向量，并通过矩阵加权网络进行交互，推导了全局同步的必要条件和稳定性分析。
AI.motivation: 经典Kuramoto模型将振荡器限制在单位圆上，每个振荡器用标量相位和自然频率描述，通过正弦耦合相互作用。作者希望将其推广到更高维度，研究更复杂的耦合网络结构。
AI.method: 提出d维推广模型，振荡器表示为(d-1)-球面上的单位向量，通过矩阵加权网络交互。采用主稳定性函数方法推导全局同步的必要条件，通过变量变换将Nd维问题简化为d维特征值问题，每个问题由标量加权拉普拉斯算子的特征值参数化。
AI.result: 发现全局同步解存在的必要条件是节点间频率矩阵相同，在矩阵加权网络情况下还需要网络结构的相干条件。稳定性分析表明，在任何连通网络上，对于任何正耦合强度K，同步解都是局部稳定的。
AI.conclusion: 成功将Kuramoto模型推广到高维空间和矩阵加权网络，建立了同步条件，证明了同步解的稳定性，并通过数值模拟验证了理论结果，为研究复杂耦合振荡器系统的同步行为提供了新框架。

title: For molecular polaritons, disorder and phonon timescales control the activation of dark states in the thermodynamic limit
summary: Collective light-matter systems host an extensive manifold of dark states whose role in the emergence of thermodynamic behavior remains poorly understood, especially in the presence of disorder and structured environments. Here, we develop a hybrid matrix product state-hierarchical equations of motion (MPS-HEOM) approach that enables numerically exact simulations of polariton dynamics from a few emitters to the thermodynamic limit under both static and dynamic disorder. This allows us, for the first time, to provide a quantitative and operational answer to the long-standing question of what is the minimum system size required to reach the thermodynamic limit in collective polaritonic systems. By introducing a convergence scale, $N_{T}$, i.e., the number of molecules required for the photonic dynamics to reach the thermodynamic limit, we show that dynamic disorder generally poses a greater computational challenge than static disorder. We attribute this behavior to the suppression of collective light-matter dynamics by disorder, which dynamically activates non-collective degrees of freedom. We further find that $N_{T}$ exhibits a turnover behavior as the bath becomes more Markovian, as the bath timescales regulate bright-to-dark energy transfer and the involvement of dark and gray states. Hence, phonon timescales control both the breakdown of collective behavior and the growth of $N_{T}$. Our results establish the suppression of collective behavior as the key mechanism governing thermodynamic convergence in disordered light-matter systems.

AI.tldr: 开发混合MPS-HEOM方法，首次定量确定集体极化子系统达到热力学极限所需的最小系统尺寸N_T，揭示动态无序比静态无序更具计算挑战性，声子时间尺度调控集体行为破坏和N_T增长。
AI.motivation: 集体光-物质系统中的暗态在热力学行为涌现中的作用尚不清楚，特别是在存在无序和结构化环境的情况下。需要理解无序集体极化子系统达到热力学极限所需的最小系统尺寸。
AI.method: 开发混合矩阵乘积态-层次运动方程（MPS-HEOM）方法，能够从少数发射体到热力学极限进行数值精确模拟，处理静态和动态无序。
AI.result: 首次定量确定了达到热力学极限所需的最小分子数N_T，发现动态无序比静态无序更具计算挑战性，N_T随浴环境变得马尔可夫而呈现转折行为，声子时间尺度调控集体行为破坏和N_T增长。
AI.conclusion: 集体行为的抑制是控制无序光-物质系统热力学收敛的关键机制，动态无序通过激活非集体自由度抑制集体光-物质动力学，浴环境时间尺度调控亮-暗能量转移和暗态参与。

title: A Compact XOR Gate Implemented With a Single Straintronic Magnetic Tunnel Junction
summary: The XOR Boolean logic gate is widely used in many applications such as encryption (XOR ciphers), binary addition (half- and full-adders), error detection (parity bits), etc. but is challenging to construct because of its demanding conditional dynamics. It typically requires multiple logic switches or other types of gates, which results in a large gate footprint and low logic density. Here, we present the design of an XOR gate with a single straintronic magnetic tunnel junction which reduces the footprint dramatically. Such a gate is non-volatile and hence suitable for non-von-Neumann architectures, processor-in-memory, etc. The switching time of the gate is ~200 ps and the energy dissipation per gate operation is ~225 aJ. Cascading of successive stages is accomplished via a CMOS device which plays no role in the gate dynamics but is needed for gain to provide logic level restoration, fan-out and isolation between input and output. This 1 MTJ-1 CMOS design has an energy dissipation that is an order of magnitude smaller than what has been reported for traditional all-transistor XOR designs.

AI.tldr: 单应变磁隧道结XOR门设计，显著减小面积，适用于非冯·诺依曼架构
AI.motivation: XOR逻辑门在加密、二进制加法、错误检测等应用中广泛使用，但传统实现需要多个逻辑开关或门电路，导致面积大、逻辑密度低。需要更紧凑、高效的设计。
AI.method: 采用单个应变磁隧道结（MTJ）实现XOR门，结合一个CMOS器件用于级联。CMOS不参与门动态，仅提供增益以实现逻辑电平恢复、扇出和输入输出隔离。
AI.result: 开关时间约200 ps，每次门操作能耗约225 aJ。1 MTJ-1 CMOS设计的能耗比传统全晶体管XOR设计低一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 单应变磁隧道结XOR门设计大幅减小了面积，具有非易失性，适用于非冯·诺依曼架构和处理器内存储器等应用，能耗显著降低。

title: Collapse of Jahn-Teller Phonons in La$_{1-x}$Sr$_{x}$MnO$_3$ with Weak Magnetoresistance
summary: Perovskite manganites are quantum materials exhibiting competing interactions inducing colossal magnetoresistance (CMR). The prevailing theory of CMR highlights the essential role of electron-phonon coupling (EPC), but mounting evidence suggests the underlying mechanism is more complicated. Here, we investigate phonons and spin-phonon coupling in ferromagnetic CMR manganites La$_{1-x}$Sr$_x$MnO$_3$ ($x$=0.2,0.3) with relatively small CMR associated with melting of the magnetic order above room temperature. High-resolution neutron scattering experiments combined with density functional theory (DFT) show that the low-temperature ferromagnetic phase is conventional: neutron scattering from phonons agrees with DFT predictions and magnons follow sinusoidal dispersions. Fluctuating magnetic moments and low-energy phonons remain conventional in the high temperature paramagnetic phase, indicating the Mn and La/Sr sublattices are not strongly perturbed by melting of ferromagnetism. In contrast, the Jahn-Teller-active optical oxygen vibrations collapse entirely above the Curie temperature, despite low CMR in these compositions, with some of the lost spectral weight reappearing as quasielastic scattering. We attribute this highly anomalous behavior to giant EPC in the charge and/or orbital channel. It drives cooperative diffusive motion of quasistatic carrier-trapping oxygen sublattice distortions once ferromagnetism disappears. We hypothesize the magnitude of magnetoresistance correlates with the rate of diffusion rather than with the strength of Jahn-Teller EPC.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过中子散射和DFT分析La1-xSrxMnO3中的声子和自旋-声子耦合，发现高温顺磁相中Jahn-Teller活性光学氧振动完全崩溃，表明存在巨大的电子-声子耦合，驱动氧亚晶格畸变的扩散运动。
AI.motivation: 传统CMR理论强调电子-声子耦合的关键作用，但越来越多的证据表明其机制更为复杂。本研究旨在探究具有相对较小CMR的铁磁锰酸盐中声子和自旋-声子耦合的行为，以揭示CMR的潜在机制。
AI.method: 采用高分辨率中子散射实验结合密度泛函理论(DFT)，研究La1-xSrxMnO3(x=0.2,0.3)在铁磁相和顺磁相中的声子和磁振子行为。
AI.result: 低温铁磁相行为常规：声子与DFT预测一致，磁振子呈正弦色散。高温顺磁相中，Jahn-Teller活性光学氧振动完全崩溃，部分谱权重以准弹性散射形式重新出现，表明存在巨大的电子-声子耦合驱动氧亚晶格畸变的扩散运动。
AI.conclusion: 磁阻大小可能与扩散速率相关，而非Jahn-Teller电子-声子耦合强度。这一发现挑战了传统CMR理论，揭示了电荷/轨道通道中巨大电子-声子耦合的关键作用。

title: Flat Topological Nodal Lines in Heavy-Fermion Compound CeCoGe$_3$
summary: The interplay between strong electronic correlations, unconventional superconductivity, and symmetry-protected topology provides a fertile ground for discovering exotic quantum states. In this work, we investigate the correlated electronic structure and topological properties of the heavy fermion material CeCoGe$_3$ using density functional theory combined with dynamical mean-field theory calculations. Our results reveal a crossover from high temperature incoherent states to low temperature coherent heavy quasiparticles, accompanied by a mass enhancement of $m^*/m_{\text{DFT}}\sim 52.6$ at $T=25$ K. The interplay between electronic correlation, spin-orbit coupling and the noncentrosymmetric $I4mm$ crystal symmetry stabilize flat topological nodal lines within 10 meV of the Fermi level, which could contribute a significant density of states. The proximity of topological nodal lines to the Fermi surface suggests a potential role in mediating pressure induced unconventional superconductivity. Our work establishes CeCoGe$_3$ as a prototype topological nodal line Kondo semimetal. The coexistence of strong correlation, non-trivial band topology and superconductivity indicate CeCoGe$_3$ as a potential candidate for realizing topological superconductivity.

AI.tldr: CeCoGe₃是一种拓扑节线近藤半金属，具有强电子关联、非平庸能带拓扑和超导性共存的特征，可能实现拓扑超导性。
AI.motivation: 研究强电子关联、非常规超导性和对称性保护拓扑之间的相互作用，探索CeCoGe₃中拓扑节线近藤半金属的特性及其在拓扑超导性中的潜在作用。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论（DFT）结合动力学平均场理论（DMFT）计算，研究CeCoGe₃的关联电子结构和拓扑性质。
AI.result: 发现从高温非相干态到低温相干重准粒子的交叉转变，质量增强因子达52.6（T=25K）。非中心对称I4mm晶体结构中，电子关联、自旋轨道耦合和晶体对称性共同稳定了费米面10meV内的平坦拓扑节线，可能贡献显著态密度。
AI.conclusion: CeCoGe₃是原型拓扑节线近藤半金属，其强关联、非平庸能带拓扑和超导性的共存表明它是实现拓扑超导性的潜在候选材料。

title: Capturing nuclear quantum effects in high-pressure superconducting hydrides and ice with nuclear-electronic orbital theory
summary: Nuclear quantum effects are essential for correctly describing hydrogen-rich materials at high pressures. Superconducting hydrides and ice are prime examples of such systems, requiring the inclusion of lattice anharmonicity and nuclear quantum effects to correctly predict and describe the structures and phase transition pressures observed experimentally. Herein, we show that the nuclear-electronic orbital density functional theory (NEO-DFT) method, which treats specified nuclei quantum mechanically on the same level as the electrons, is capable of accurately describing nuclear quantum effects in superconducting hydrides and ice. NEO-DFT predicts the hydrogen-bond symmetrization pressure in H$_3$S and D$_3$S, benchmarking against the more expensive stochastic self-consistent harmonic approximation (SSCHA) method, and predicts the correct symmetric Fm$\bar{3}$m structure for LaH$_{10}$ at a wide range of pressures. NEO-DFT also predicts the ice VIII to ice X phase transition pressures for H$_2$O and D$_2$O in agreement with experimental measurements. The accuracy, computational efficiency, and broad applicability of the NEO method opens the door for expanded large-scale studies into these types of systems.

AI.tldr: NEO-DFT方法能准确描述高压氢化物和冰中的核量子效应，在预测相变压力方面与实验和更昂贵方法一致
AI.motivation: 高压氢化物和冰等富氢材料需要包含晶格非谐性和核量子效应才能准确预测结构和相变压力，但现有方法计算成本高
AI.method: 使用核-电子轨道密度泛函理论（NEO-DFT），将特定原子核与电子同等量子力学处理，并与更昂贵的随机自洽谐波近似（SSCHA）方法进行基准测试
AI.result: NEO-DFT准确预测了H3S和D3S中氢键对称化压力，正确预测了LaH10在宽压力范围内的对称结构，以及H2O和D2O的冰VIII到冰X相变压力，与实验测量一致
AI.conclusion: NEO方法具有准确性、计算效率和广泛适用性，为大规模研究这类系统打开了大门

title: Full-Scale GPU-Accelerated Transient EM-Thermal-Mechanical Co-Simulation for Early-Stage Design of Advanced Packages
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication at the 30th IEEE Workshop on Signal and Power Integrity (SPI 2026), to be held in Turin, Italy, on June 14-17, 2026
summary: In the early-stage design of advanced electronic packages, designers face a critical trade-off between simulation fidelity and computational turnaround time. Conventional early-stage methodologies typically achieve speed by relying on steady-state assumptions and structural homogenization. While computationally efficient, these approximations fundamentally fail to capture dynamic thermal events and stress concentrations at fine-grained internal interfaces, effectively masking failure mechanisms driven by transient signal bursts. In this work, we present a GPU-accelerated transient coupled Electromagnetic-Thermal-Mechanical solver that resolves this bottleneck. The proposed solver enables full-scale, non-homogenized, time-domain simulation of large-scale packages with runtimes amenable for rapid design iteration. Simulation of a NEC SX-Aurora TSUBASA package demonstrates that the tool allows for the identification of signal-induced adiabatic stress that is typically invisible to steady-state and homogenized baselines. This capability brings sign-off level physics fidelity to the early design phase, facilitating the prevention of costly late-stage design failures and broader transient thermal performance degradation risks.

AI.tldr: 提出GPU加速的瞬态电磁-热-机械耦合求解器，解决先进电子封装早期设计中仿真精度与计算速度的权衡问题，能够识别传统稳态和均质化方法无法捕捉的信号诱导绝热应力。
AI.motivation: 在先进电子封装的早期设计阶段，设计师面临仿真精度与计算周转时间的关键权衡。传统早期设计方法依赖稳态假设和结构均质化来获得速度，但这些近似无法捕捉动态热事件和细粒度内部界面的应力集中，掩盖了瞬态信号脉冲驱动的失效机制。
AI.method: 开发了GPU加速的瞬态耦合电磁-热-机械求解器，支持全尺度、非均质化、时域的大规模封装仿真，运行时间适合快速设计迭代。
AI.result: 通过对NEC SX-Aurora TSUBASA封装的仿真演示，该工具能够识别传统稳态和均质化基线方法通常无法发现的信号诱导绝热应力。
AI.conclusion: 该求解器将签核级物理精度带入早期设计阶段，有助于预防成本高昂的后期设计失效和更广泛的瞬态热性能退化风险。

title: The quantum square-well fluid: a thermodynamic geometric view
summary: We investigate several aspects of the thermodynamic geometry for a quantum fluid with square-well interactions using a third-order perturbation theory framework based on the path-integral-necklace analogy. A comparison is made between the thermodynamic and geometric properties of the quantum fluid and its classical counterpart for the interaction ranges $λ^{*}= 1.3$, 1.5, and 1.7. In particular, we analyze the scalar curvature behavior, criticality, and the corresponding Widom lines derived from curvature and several thermodynamic response functions. Quantum effects are shown to smooth supercritical anomalies of the scalar curvature and to shift its extrema for short-range interactions, while leaving the critical exponents of both the curvature and its heat capacity consistent with mean-field predictions. Widom lines associated with temperature-dependent response functions and with the curvature scalar exhibit pronounced classical-quantum differences for short interaction ranges; in contrast, those derived from the isothermal compressibility exhibit only minor variations. Overall, these results highlight the sensitivity of geometric information of thermodynamic systems due to quantum effects and the crucial role of the interaction range in shaping supercritical thermodynamic behavior.

AI.tldr: 研究量子流体热力学几何性质，比较经典与量子系统的差异，分析量子效应如何平滑超临界异常并影响Widom线
AI.motivation: 探讨量子效应对热力学系统几何性质的影响，特别是量子流体与经典流体在热力学几何特性上的差异，以及相互作用范围对超临界热力学行为的影响
AI.method: 采用基于路径积分-项链类比的第三阶微扰理论框架，研究具有方阱相互作用的量子流体，比较λ*=1.3、1.5、1.7三种相互作用范围下的热力学和几何性质
AI.result: 量子效应平滑了标量曲率的超临界异常，对短程相互作用会移动其极值点；临界指数与平均场预测一致；短程相互作用下Widom线表现出显著的经典-量子差异，而等温压缩率相关的Widom线变化较小
AI.conclusion: 量子效应对热力学系统的几何信息具有敏感性，相互作用范围在塑造超临界热力学行为中起着关键作用

title: Machine learning the two-electron reduced density matrix in molecules and condensed phases
summary: Machine learning is rapidly accelerating materials and chemical discovery, but most current models target energies, forces, or selected molecular properties rather than the underlying many-body electronic structure. Learning electronic-structure proxies, such as reduced density matrices, offers a path to surrogates that can predict a broad range of observables from a single ML model. Short of learning the full wavefunction, the two-electron reduced density matrix (2-RDM) is among the most information-rich, minimally lossy targets, providing direct access to expectation values of arbitrary one- and two-electron operators regardless of the strength of the underlying electron correlation. Here we show that learning the 2-RDM is a feasible goal, yielding exceptionally accurate models. We develop surrogates for correlated wavefunction methods (including configuration interaction and coupled cluster) that yield 2-RDMs with sufficient fidelity to provide direct, training-free access to energies and forces for driving energy-conserving molecular dynamics. To tackle realistic molecular condensed phases, we leverage a many-body expansion of the 2-RDM, using our ML models to supply the expansion terms and enabling ML-powered, coupled-cluster-quality electronic structure and energetics for large solvated systems. As a demonstration, we showcase a coupled-cluster-level electronic-structure calculation of glucose solvated by 500 water molecules achieved at Hartree-Fock cost. This work establishes a general framework for learning correlated electronic structure with high fidelity and deploying it to systems beyond the reach of conventional ab initio methods.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种学习双电子约化密度矩阵(2-RDM)的机器学习方法，能够以哈特里-福克级别的计算成本实现耦合簇精度的电子结构计算，适用于大分子溶剂化体系。
AI.motivation: 当前大多数机器学习模型主要关注能量、力或特定分子性质，而非底层的多体电子结构。学习电子结构代理（如约化密度矩阵）可以提供能够从单一ML模型预测广泛可观测量的替代模型。2-RDM是信息最丰富、损失最小的目标之一，能够直接获取任意单电子和双电子算符的期望值。
AI.method: 开发了学习2-RDM的机器学习代理模型，用于相关波函数方法（包括组态相互作用和耦合簇）。采用2-RDM的多体展开方法，利用ML模型提供展开项，从而实现对大型溶剂化系统的ML驱动、耦合簇质量的电子结构和能量计算。
AI.result: 成功实现了葡萄糖在500个水分子溶剂化下的耦合簇级别电子结构计算，计算成本仅相当于哈特里-福克方法。模型能够提供足够保真度的2-RDM，直接获得能量和力，用于驱动能量守恒的分子动力学。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作建立了一个学习高保真相关电子结构并将其应用于超越传统从头算方法范围系统的通用框架，为加速材料和化学发现提供了新途径。

title: Anharmonicity and Charge-Noise Sensitivity of Fraunhofer Qubit
summary: We present a theory of a flux-tunable superconducting qubit, the "Fraunhofer qubit," based on the Fraunhofer interference in a wide ballistic Josephson junction. As magnetic flux threads the junction, the Josephson potential is effectively averaged over a phase window proportional to flux. For perfectly transmitting junctions, as flux approaches one flux quantum h/2e, the flux averaging transforms the potential near its minimum from a quadratic to a triangular shape, resulting in significantly enhanced anharmonicity. This enhancement persists for junctions with lower transparency conducting channels. Microscopic tight-binding simulations that include inhomogeneous electrostatic potential and disorder confirm the enhancement of anharmonicity. These results establish a framework for flux control in hybrid superconducting circuits, providing an operating point where anharmonicity and charge-noise protection can be optimally balanced.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于宽弹道约瑟夫森结中夫琅禾费干涉的"夫琅禾费量子比特"，通过磁通调控实现增强的非谐性
AI.motivation: 在超导量子电路中，需要在非谐性（用于快速门操作）和电荷噪声保护之间取得平衡。传统量子比特设计难以同时优化这两个参数
AI.method: 利用宽弹道约瑟夫森结中的夫琅禾费干涉效应，通过磁通量调控约瑟夫森势能。当磁通量接近一个磁通量子h/2e时，势能在最小值附近从二次型转变为三角形，显著增强非谐性。通过微观紧束缚模拟验证，包括非均匀静电势和无序效应
AI.result: 对于完美传输的结，磁通量接近一个磁通量子时，非谐性显著增强。这种增强在具有较低透射率导电通道的结中仍然存在。模拟结果证实了非谐性的增强效应
AI.conclusion: 建立了一个用于混合超导电路中磁通调控的框架，提供了一个可以最优平衡非谐性和电荷噪声保护的工作点，为设计新型可调谐量子比特提供了理论基础

title: Effect of Exchange-Correlation Functionals on Schottky Barriers at Si/Metal Interfaces
summary: Accurate prediction of Schottky barrier heights (SBHs) at metal-semiconductor (M-SC) interfaces is essential for understanding and optimizing charge injection in electronic and optoelectronic devices. However, first-principles calculations of SBHs remain challenging due to the combined difficulties of semiconductor bandgap underestimation, metal Fermi level placement, lattice-mismatch, relative geometric alignment and electrostatic potential alignment across heterogeneous interfaces. In this work, we present a systematic and physically grounded assessment of computational strategies for SBH prediction using Si(111)/Metal (Al, Cu, Ag, Au) interfaces as representative test cases. We evaluate multiple exchange-correlation (XC) treatments, in combination with three distinct bulk reference protocols: relaxed bulk, relaxed bulk with spin-orbit coupling, and strained bulk references consistent with the interface geometry. By benchmarking against experimental data, we demonstrate that structural and electrostatic consistency between interface and bulk reference calculations is the dominant factor governing SBH accuracy. We show that mixed hybrid-semilocal approaches combined with strained reference protocols yield uniformly positive and significantly improved SBHs, achieving near-experimental accuracy while maintaining a favorable balance between computational cost and predictive performance. Our results establish a clear and transferable methodology for reliable Schottky barrier prediction and provide practical guidance for large-scale screening and interface engineering.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统评估了肖特基势垒高度预测的计算策略，通过Si(111)/金属界面测试，发现结构和静电一致性是关键，混合杂化-半局域方法结合应变参考协议能获得接近实验精度的结果。
AI.motivation: 金属-半导体界面肖特基势垒高度的准确预测对电子和光电器件至关重要，但第一性原理计算面临半导体带隙低估、金属费米能级定位、晶格失配、几何对齐和静电势对齐等多重挑战。
AI.method: 使用Si(111)/金属（Al、Cu、Ag、Au）界面作为代表性测试案例，评估多种交换关联处理，结合三种不同的体相参考协议：弛豫体相、含自旋轨道耦合的弛豫体相、以及与界面几何一致的应变体相参考。
AI.result: 通过实验数据基准测试表明，界面和体相参考计算之间的结构和静电一致性是决定SBH准确性的主导因素。混合杂化-半局域方法结合应变参考协议能产生一致正向且显著改善的SBH，达到接近实验精度，同时在计算成本和预测性能之间保持良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: 研究建立了可靠肖特基势垒预测的明确且可转移的方法论，为大规模筛选和界面工程提供了实用指导。

title: Coherent-state ansatz for the Holstein polaron in one and two dimensions
summary: The Holstein model often serves as an archetype for electron-phonon interactions and polaron formation in solids. However, precise descriptions of the Holstein polaron are difficult when the phonon frequency is small and the electron-phonon coupling is strong, due to the presence of many phonons in the ground state. We present a semi-analytical approximation that consists of a variational ansatz with clouds of phonons surrounding the electron in the form of coherent states. This becomes particularly simple and exact in the Lang-Firsov limit. We determine the domain of validity away from this limit, and further explore the improvement achieved with a removal of the requirement that the phonon clouds form coherent states. Both approximations work extremely well at strong coupling, and both work surprisingly well also at weak coupling. The coherent-state ansatz provides a simple and intuitive picture of the polaron ground-state wavefunction, and in addition predicts accurate values for the ground-state energy and effective mass.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于描述强耦合Holstein极化子的半解析变分方法，基于相干态声子云变分波函数，在Lang-Firsov极限下精确，在强耦合和弱耦合区域都表现优异。
AI.motivation: Holstein模型是描述电子-声子相互作用和极化子形成的典型模型，但在声子频率较小且电子-声子耦合较强时，由于基态中存在大量声子，精确描述Holstein极化子变得困难。
AI.method: 提出半解析变分近似方法，采用电子周围声子云形成相干态的变分波函数。在Lang-Firsov极限下变得特别简单且精确。进一步探索了移除声子云必须为相干态要求后的改进。
AI.result: 两种近似方法在强耦合区域表现极好，在弱耦合区域也出人意料地表现良好。相干态变分波函数提供了极化子基态波函数的简单直观图像，并能准确预测基态能量和有效质量。
AI.conclusion: 提出的变分方法为描述Holstein极化子提供了有效的半解析工具，特别是在强耦合区域，相干态变分波函数既直观又准确，具有重要的理论和计算价值。

title: Higgs gap modes in superconducting circuit quantisation
summary: We extend a recently developed projective circuit quantisation approach to incorporate superconducting Higgs modes associated to gap dynamics. This approach starts from a microscopic fermionic Hamiltonian for mesoscopic superconductors, and projects the system onto its low-energy "BCS" Hilbert space. We derive analytical results for the superconducting Higgs mass, "spring" constant, and oscillation frequency of the gap dynamics, which we validate numerically. We compute anharmonic corrections to the Higgs frequency for higher excitations of small superconducting islands, and compare our results to previous long-wavelength calculations.

AI.tldr: 扩展投影电路量子化方法以包含超导Higgs模，从微观费米子哈密顿量出发，投影到低能BCS希尔伯特空间，解析计算Higgs质量、弹簧常数和振荡频率，并验证数值结果。
AI.motivation: 将最近发展的投影电路量子化方法扩展到包含与能隙动力学相关的超导Higgs模，以更好地描述介观超导体的低能物理。
AI.method: 从微观费米子哈密顿量出发，将系统投影到低能BCS希尔伯特空间，推导Higgs模的解析表达式，包括质量、弹簧常数和振荡频率，并进行数值验证。
AI.result: 获得了超导Higgs质量、弹簧常数和能隙动力学振荡频率的解析结果，计算了小超导岛高激发态的Higgs频率非简谐修正，并与之前的长波长计算结果进行了比较。
AI.conclusion: 成功扩展了投影电路量子化方法以包含Higgs模，为介观超导体中的能隙动力学提供了更完整的理论描述，解析结果与数值验证一致。

title: Computationally Efficient Data-Driven Topology Design Independent from High-Infoentropy Initial Dataset
summary: Topology optimization (TO) has been widely adopted in engineering design; however, it is prone to being trapped in local optima, particularly in strongly nonlinear problems. Sensitivity-free data-driven topology design (DDTD) offers a promising alternative. Nevertheless, existing DDTD-based methods still depend heavily on prior information or sensitivity-based TO methods for initialization, limiting their generality and independence in engineering applications. In this study, an efficient DDTD-based framework capable of being driven from low information-entropy initial datasets is proposed while improving computational efficiency. To reduce the dependence on high information-entropy initial datasets, a mesh-independent mutation module is introduced as a supplementary source of geometric features, enabling stable exploration under low information-entropy initialization. To alleviate the computational bottleneck in DDTD, where all candidate structures require numerical evaluations, a non-AI-based rapid identification algorithm is developed to efficiently identify potential high-performance structures, thereby significantly reducing the number of expensive high-fidelity simulations. The framework generates material distributions on body-fitted meshes to maintain consistency between numerical simulations and physical manufacturing. A signed distance field-based minimum length constraint is further incorporated to ensure reliable mesh generation. Numerical experiments on strongly nonlinear stress-related problems, together with comparisons with sensitivity-based TO methods, demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. In microfluidic reactor and shell design problems involving non-differentiable constraints, the proposed method successfully addresses scenarios that remain challenging for both sensitivity-based TO and conventional DDTD-based methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效的数据驱动拓扑设计框架，能够在低信息熵初始数据集下工作，通过网格无关变异模块和快速识别算法提高计算效率，解决强非线性问题中传统方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统拓扑优化容易陷入局部最优解，特别是在强非线性问题中。现有的数据驱动拓扑设计方法仍然严重依赖先验信息或基于敏感度的拓扑优化方法进行初始化，限制了其在工程应用中的通用性和独立性。
AI.method: 1) 引入网格无关变异模块作为几何特征的补充来源，实现低信息熵初始化下的稳定探索；2) 开发非AI快速识别算法，高效识别潜在高性能结构，减少昂贵的高保真模拟次数；3) 在贴体网格上生成材料分布，保持数值模拟与物理制造的一致性；4) 引入基于符号距离场的最小长度约束确保可靠的网格生成。
AI.result: 在强非线性应力相关问题上的数值实验表明该方法有效。在涉及不可微约束的微流控反应器和壳体设计问题中，该方法成功解决了基于敏感度的拓扑优化和传统数据驱动拓扑设计方法都难以处理的场景。
AI.conclusion: 提出的数据驱动拓扑设计框架能够在低信息熵初始数据集下高效工作，通过创新的变异模块和快速识别算法显著提高计算效率，为强非线性、不可微约束的工程问题提供了有效的解决方案。

title: A general statistical framework for vacancy and self-interstitial properties in concentrated multicomponent solids
summary: A rigorous understanding of the thermodynamic properties of point defects, namely vacancies and self-interstitials, is crucial for the discovery and screening of structural materials in clean energy applications. In this work, we extend a previously-developed statistical framework for predicting the thermodynamics of single-site impurities to further predict the thermodynamics of self-interstitial dumbbells in an arbitrarily complex alloy. We then apply this extended framework to compute effective formation energies in fully disordered Fe-Cr and Cu-Ni alloys. Notably, we predict that some self-interstitial dumbbell types that are high-energy in pure Fe become stabilized by Cr. We additionally describe a symmetry-breaking effect, wherein high solute concentrations distort the defect free energy surface, yielding misaligned self-interstitials.

AI.tldr: 扩展统计框架预测复杂合金中自间隙哑铃的热力学性质，应用于Fe-Cr和Cu-Ni合金，发现Cr能稳定某些高能自间隙哑铃，并描述对称性破缺效应。
AI.motivation: 理解点缺陷（空位和自间隙原子）的热力学性质对于清洁能源应用中结构材料的发现和筛选至关重要。需要开发能够预测复杂合金中自间隙哑铃热力学的统计框架。
AI.method: 扩展先前开发的单点杂质热力学预测统计框架，使其能够预测任意复杂合金中自间隙哑铃的热力学性质。将该框架应用于完全无序的Fe-Cr和Cu-Ni合金，计算有效形成能。
AI.result: 预测发现：1）在纯铁中高能的一些自间隙哑铃类型会被Cr稳定；2）高溶质浓度会扭曲缺陷自由能表面，导致自间隙原子错位，产生对称性破缺效应。
AI.conclusion: 扩展的统计框架能够有效预测复杂合金中自间隙哑铃的热力学行为，揭示了溶质元素对缺陷稳定性的重要影响，为结构材料设计提供了理论基础。

title: \textit{Ab Initio} Adiabatic Potential Energy Surfaces and Non-adiabatic Couplings for O$_3$: Construction of Four State Diabatic Hamiltonian
summary: We compute highly accurate first principle based \textit{ab initio} adiabatic potential energy surfaces (PESs) using State-Averaged Multi-Configurational Self-Consistent Field (SA-MCSCF) followed by internally contracted Multi-Reference Configuration Interaction method incorporating fixed-reference Davidson corrections [ic-MRCI(Q)], where a full valence active space of 18 electrons in 12 orbitals and aug-cc-pVQZ basis set are employed for the low-lying four singlet electronic states of ozone ($\tilde{X}^1A'$, $1~^1A''$, $1~^1A'$ and $2^1A''$). It accurately reproduces the dissociation energies of ozone (1.101 eV) as well as the molecular oxygen (5.106 eV) along with vibrational frequencies of O$_3$ in comparison with experimental data. To ensure appropriate accuracy and proper convergence in the interaction as well as asymptotic regions, we (a) extend the number of electronic states in SA-MCSCF calculation (singlet as well as triplet and quintet); (b) systematically expand the active space [(12e,9o) $\rightarrow$ (18e,12o) $\rightarrow$ (24e,15o)] and basis set size (AVDZ $\rightarrow$ AV6Z $\rightarrow$ Complete Basis Set limit); (c) incorporate multi-reference character along with Davidson correction. Conical intersections between the adjacent electronic states (1-2, 2-3 and 3-4) are located at \textit{C}$_{2v}$, \textit{D}$_{3h}$ as well as \textit{C}$_{s}$ geometries through the four-state adiabatic-to-diabatic transformation of non-adiabatic coupling terms (NACTs) computed at Coupled-Perturbed Multi-Configurational Self-Consistent Field (CP-MCSCF) method along the circular contours. Finally, we present: (a) ic-MRCI(Q) calculated minimum energy path of incoming oxygen to the diatom (O$_2$) is devoid of any ``reef'' feature; (b) NACTs and diabatic PES matrix elements as function of hyperangles ($θ$,$φ$) at a fixed hyperradius $ρ= 4$ Bohr for a four state sub-Hilbert space.

AI.tldr: 本文通过高精度从头算方法计算了臭氧四个低能单重态电子态的绝热势能面，准确再现了臭氧和氧分子的解离能，并确定了电子态间的圆锥交叉点。
AI.motivation: 研究臭氧分子低能电子态的精确势能面对于理解其光化学过程、反应动力学和光谱特性至关重要，特别是电子态间的非绝热耦合和圆锥交叉现象。
AI.method: 采用状态平均多组态自洽场(SA-MCSCF)和内部收缩多参考组态相互作用方法[ic-MRCI(Q)]，结合Davidson校正。使用18电子12轨道的全价活性空间和aug-cc-pVQZ基组。通过系统扩展活性空间和基组大小确保精度，并采用四态绝热-非绝热变换定位圆锥交叉点。
AI.result: 准确再现了臭氧(1.101 eV)和氧分子(5.106 eV)的解离能，以及臭氧的振动频率。在C2v、D3h和Cs几何构型处确定了电子态间的圆锥交叉点。发现氧原子与氧二聚体结合的最小能量路径不存在"暗礁"特征。
AI.conclusion: 成功构建了臭氧四个低能单重态的高精度势能面，为理解臭氧的光化学过程和反应动力学提供了可靠的理论基础，特别是电子态间的非绝热耦合和圆锥交叉现象。

title: Non-equilibrium formulation of helicity-dependent thermal field for ultrafast magnetization dynamics
summary: Far-from-equilibrium magnetization dynamics can be accessed when a magnetic material is subject to a femtosecond excitation, such as an optical laser or an electric current. Numerically, the demagnetization of magnetic materials is typically modeled by atomistic spin dynamics. Micromagnetic models generally fail to reproduce ultrafast demagnetization in a grid independent manner. Here, we propose a non-equilibrium thermal field whose features depend on atomic spin flip probabilities. Under the assumption that each spin flip is equivalent to a quantum of angular momentum, equivalent temperatures on the order of thousands of Kelvin are achieved. Demagnetization is quantitatively reproduced for several cell sizes. The presented approach can be further refined and extended towards a grid-independent and multiscale modeling of ultrafast magnetization dynamics.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于非平衡热场的网格独立方法，用于模拟超快退磁过程
AI.motivation: 传统微磁模型无法以网格独立的方式再现超快退磁过程，而原子自旋动力学模拟计算成本高，需要一种新的多尺度建模方法
AI.method: 提出非平衡热场模型，其特性依赖于原子自旋翻转概率，假设每个自旋翻转相当于角动量量子，实现数千开尔文量级的等效温度
AI.result: 该方法能够定量再现多种晶胞尺寸下的退磁过程，实现了网格独立的模拟效果
AI.conclusion: 该方法可进一步优化和扩展，实现网格独立和多尺度的超快磁化动力学建模

title: Patterns of load, elastic energy and damage in network models of architected composite materials
summary: We investigate the role of architected thin films in the interfacial failure properties of bi-layer composites. Our results show that, while graded structures can be used to prescribe failure at the interface, they do not offer significant advantages in terms of fracture toughness. Hierarchically patterned layers can localize failure at the interface and simultaneously enhance interface toughness, by enforcing a buffer region where elastic energy is dissipated in the form of diffuse damage, so that no stress concentration can drive crack growth. To analyze these mechanisms, the associated patterns of local load redistribution and the soft deformation modes, we develop a network formalism that brings together concepts of discrete differential geometry and spectral graph theory.

AI.tldr: 研究结构化薄膜在双层复合材料界面失效中的作用，发现分级结构能控制失效位置但无法显著提高断裂韧性，而分层图案化层既能定位界面失效又能增强界面韧性
AI.motivation: 研究结构化薄膜如何影响双层复合材料的界面失效特性，探索通过结构设计来控制失效位置并提高界面韧性的可能性
AI.method: 开发结合离散微分几何和谱图理论的网络形式化方法，分析局部载荷重新分布模式和软变形模式
AI.result: 分级结构能规定界面失效位置但无法显著提高断裂韧性；分层图案化层能同时实现界面失效定位和界面韧性增强，通过创建缓冲区域使弹性能量以弥散损伤形式耗散
AI.conclusion: 分层图案化结构设计能有效控制界面失效行为，通过创建能量耗散缓冲区域防止应力集中驱动裂纹扩展，为复合材料界面工程提供新思路

title: Alleviating Projection-Space Sensitivity in DFT+U via Renormalized U
summary: Although the DFT+U method significantly improves the description of correlated electronic systems, its accuracy is known to depend strongly on the input parameters including local projection space used for the Hubbard correction. As a result, calculations performed with different projection sizes can yield quantitatively different -- and sometimes divergent -- results. In this work, we investigate the dependence of the effective Coulomb interaction $U_{\mathrm{eff}}$ on projection size using constrained DFT calculations for rutile TiO$_2$ and $β$-MnO$_2$. We find that as the projection size increases, the self-consistently calculated $U_{\mathrm{eff}}$ decreases significantly -- by as much as $33$\%. This trend is attributed to renormalization of the Coulomb interaction through orbital relaxation and enhanced screening. When $U_{\mathrm{eff}}$ values recalculated for each projection size are employed, the results for lattice parameters, electronic structure, and relative phase stability become consistent across different projection sizes. These findings can provide a practical route to alleviate projection-size dependence in DFT+U calculations.

AI.tldr: DFT+U方法的准确性依赖于局域投影空间大小，不同投影尺寸会导致结果差异。研究发现随着投影尺寸增大，有效库仑相互作用U_eff显著减小（可达33%），这是由于轨道弛豫和增强的屏蔽效应。当为每个投影尺寸重新计算U_eff时，晶格参数、电子结构和相对相稳定性在不同投影尺寸下变得一致。
AI.motivation: DFT+U方法虽然显著改善了关联电子系统的描述，但其准确性严重依赖于输入参数，特别是用于Hubbard修正的局域投影空间。使用不同投影尺寸的计算可能产生定量不同甚至发散的结果，这限制了方法的可靠性和可重复性。
AI.method: 使用约束DFT计算研究有效库仑相互作用U_eff对投影尺寸的依赖性，以金红石TiO2和β-MnO2为研究对象。通过自洽计算不同投影尺寸下的U_eff值，并分析轨道弛豫和屏蔽效应的影响机制。
AI.result: 发现随着投影尺寸增大，自洽计算的U_eff显著减小，降幅可达33%。这种趋势归因于轨道弛豫和增强的屏蔽效应导致的库仑相互作用重整化。当为每个投影尺寸重新计算相应的U_eff值时，晶格参数、电子结构和相对相稳定性在不同投影尺寸下变得一致。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为缓解DFT+U计算中投影尺寸依赖性提供了实用途径：通过为每个投影尺寸重新计算相应的U_eff值，可以获得一致且可靠的计算结果，从而提高DFT+U方法的可重复性和准确性。

title: Interband pairing in two-band superconductors with spin-orbit and Zeeman couplings
summary: Interband pairing in multiband superconductors is often neglected because of its higher energetic cost compared with intraband pairing. We show that, in multiband systems, a Zeeman magnetic field can stabilize interband pairing through the near degeneracy of spin-split branches from different bands, even within a minimal on-site attractive interaction. Using hexagonal tight-binding models with locally broken inversion symmetry, we find a Zeeman-driven transition between a conventional intraband s-wave state and an interband-dominated superconducting Mixing state. The resulting quasiparticle spectrum is intrinsically gapless, leading to anomalous thermodynamic behavior, including a T-linear specific heat at low temperatures, reflecting a finite zero-energy density of states.

AI.tldr: 磁场可稳定多带超导体中的带间配对，导致无隙能谱和反常热力学行为
AI.motivation: 研究多带超导体中通常被忽略的带间配对机制，探索磁场如何影响配对类型转变
AI.method: 使用具有局部破缺反演对称性的六角紧束缚模型，在最小在位吸引相互作用下分析Zeeman磁场效应
AI.result: 发现Zeeman磁场驱动从传统带内s波态到带间主导的Mixing态转变，产生无隙准粒子能谱和T线性比热
AI.conclusion: 磁场可通过不同能带自旋劈裂分支的近简并性稳定带间配对，导致反常热力学性质

title: NATPS: Nonadiabatic Transition Path Sampling Using Time-Reversible MASH Dynamics
summary:
Rare nonadiabatic events play a central role in photochemistry but remain difficult to simulate because excited-state dynamics is computationally demanding and often stochastic. Here we introduce a deterministic and time-reversible implementation of nonadiabatic dynamics that enables the application of transition path sampling (TPS) to excited-state processes. Our approach builds on the Mapping Approach to Surface Hopping (MASH) and establishes the conditions required for path ensemble sampling, in particular time reversibility and detailed balance. Combining this dynamics with the TPS framework yields a new method, termed nonadiabatic transition path sampling (NATPS).
  Using a model system of electronically coupled potential energy surfaces, we demonstrate that NATPS efficiently generates ensembles of reactive trajectories and provides mechanistic insight into nonadiabatic pathways. Compared with brute-force trajectory simulations and forward-flux sampling approaches, NATPS substantially reduces the computational effort required to obtain reactive trajectories.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种确定性和时间可逆的非绝热动力学方法，结合过渡路径采样，创建了非绝热过渡路径采样方法，显著提高了模拟稀有非绝热事件的效率。
AI.motivation: 稀有非绝热事件在光化学中至关重要，但由于激发态动力学计算成本高且通常具有随机性，难以进行模拟。现有方法效率低下，需要更有效的采样技术来研究这些过程。
AI.method: 基于映射表面跳跃方法，开发了确定性和时间可逆的非绝热动力学实现，满足路径集合采样的条件（特别是时间可逆性和细致平衡）。将此动力学与过渡路径采样框架结合，创建了非绝热过渡路径采样方法。
AI.result: 在电子耦合势能面模型系统中，NATPS能有效生成反应轨迹集合，提供非绝热路径的机理洞察。与暴力轨迹模拟和前向通量采样方法相比，NATPS显著减少了获取反应轨迹所需的计算量。
AI.conclusion: NATPS方法为研究稀有非绝热事件提供了一种高效的计算框架，将确定性的非绝热动力学与过渡路径采样相结合，克服了传统方法的计算瓶颈，有望推动光化学过程的机理研究。

title: Qubit discretizations of d=3 conformal field theories
summary: We propose that scaling dimensions of d=3 conformal field theories can be studied on a system of qubits with near term quantum simulation platforms. Our proposal chooses couplings of quantum many-body problems on a polyhedral lattice at which the conformal state-operator correspondence can be observed most accurately in the spectrum. We validate our protocol on the Ising model where we extract the scaling dimensions of a number of scaling operators with a few percent accuracy from the spectrum of a system of just 20 qubits. The procedure makes only minor assumptions beyond general conformal invariance -- it may hence be applied widely. Requirements and challenges to realize this proposal on quantum computers are discussed. Our results demonstrate that for current or near term qubit platforms, three dimensional conformal field theories present a unique opportunity -- a forefront problem that is difficult on classical computers but may be solved through quantum simulation.

AI.tldr: 提出利用近期量子计算平台研究三维共形场论标度维度的方案，通过在多面体晶格上选择特定耦合点，从20量子比特系统中以数个百分点精度提取标度维度。
AI.motivation: 三维共形场论是经典计算机难以处理的前沿问题，但可能通过量子模拟解决。当前或近期的量子比特平台为研究这类理论提供了独特机会。
AI.method: 在多面体晶格上选择特定耦合点，使得共形态-算符对应关系在谱中最准确可观测。该方法仅需超出一般共形不变性的少量假设，可广泛应用。
AI.result: 在Ising模型上验证协议，仅用20量子比特系统就从谱中提取多个标度算符的标度维度，精度达到几个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 三维共形场论为当前或近期量子比特平台提供了独特机会——这是一个经典计算机困难但可通过量子模拟解决的前沿问题。

title: Scaling Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials with Mixtures of Experts
summary: Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials (MLIPs) enable accurate large-scale atomistic simulations, yet improving their expressive capacity efficiently remains challenging. Here we systematically develop Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) and Mixture-of-Linear-Experts (MoLE) architectures for MLIPs and analyze the effects of routing strategies and expert designs. We show that sparse activation combined with shared experts yields substantial performance gains, and that nonlinear MoE formulations outperform MoLE when shared experts are present, underscoring the importance of nonlinear expert specialization. Furthermore, element-wise routing consistently surpasses configuration-level routing, while global MoE routing often leads to numerical instability. The resulting element-wise MoE model achieves state-of-the-art accuracy across the OMol25, OMat24, and OC20M benchmarks. Analysis of routing patterns reveals chemically interpretable expert specialization aligned with periodic-table trends, indicating that the model effectively captures element-specific chemical characteristics for precise interatomic modeling.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统开发了用于机器学习原子间势能（MLIPs）的混合专家（MoE）和混合线性专家（MoLE）架构，分析了路由策略和专家设计的影响，发现稀疏激活结合共享专家能显著提升性能，元素级路由优于配置级路由，最终模型在多个基准测试中达到最先进精度。
AI.motivation: 机器学习原子间势能（MLIPs）虽然能实现精确的大规模原子模拟，但如何高效提升其表达能力仍然具有挑战性。研究者希望探索混合专家架构在MLIPs中的应用潜力，以改进模型性能。
AI.method: 系统开发了混合专家（MoE）和混合线性专家（MoLE）架构用于MLIPs，分析了不同的路由策略（元素级路由vs配置级路由）和专家设计（共享专家vs专用专家）。研究了稀疏激活机制和专家非线性特性的影响。
AI.result: 稀疏激活结合共享专家能带来显著的性能提升；非线性MoE在存在共享专家时优于MoLE；元素级路由始终优于配置级路由；全局MoE路由常导致数值不稳定；最终的元素级MoE模型在OMol25、OMat24和OC20M基准测试中达到最先进精度；路由模式分析显示专家专业化与元素周期表趋势一致，表明模型能有效捕捉元素特异性化学特征。
AI.conclusion: 混合专家架构能有效提升MLIPs的表达能力，元素级路由策略结合共享专家设计是最优方案，模型不仅能达到最先进性能，还能学习到化学可解释的专家专业化模式，为精确的原子间建模提供了新思路。

title: Pressure-Induced Metal-Insulator and Paramagnet-Altermagnet Transitions in Rutile OsO2 Single Crystals
summary: Altermagnets with compensated spin structures and nonrelativistic spin splitting have emerged as a new class of magnetic materials. Rutile OsO2 has been theoretically predicted to be altermagnetic, but experimental studies have been limited by synthesis challenges. We have succeeded in synthesizing high-quality single crystals of rutile OsO2. Electrical transport studies reveal that OsO2 is highly conductive and exhibits clear Fermi liquid behavior, indicating strong electron-electron scattering. Magnetic measurements show that the crystals are isotropically paramagnetic. Density-functional theory calculations indicate that bulk OsO2 is semimetallic with coexisting electron and hole pockets, with its magnetic ground state strongly dependent on the on-site Coulomb correlation U. Angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy studies unveil that the bulk bands do not yet show altermagnetic spin splitting. Interestingly, resistivity is rather pressure sensitive: at 44 GPa, a clear metal-insulator transition occurs. Hybrid functional calculations reveal that applying pressure significantly increases the Hubbard U value, driving a phase transition from a paramagnetic metal to an altermagnetic metal, and eventually to an altermagnetic insulator. These findings suggest that tuning external pressure effectively modulates the magnetic ground state of OsO2, providing a pathway to realize altermagnetism in this material.

AI.tldr: OsO2单晶在常压下为顺磁性金属，压力可调控其向altermagnetic金属和绝缘体转变
AI.motivation: 探索OsO2作为altermagnet候选材料的实验验证，研究其电子结构和磁性质，特别是压力对磁基态的调控作用
AI.method: 合成高质量OsO2单晶，结合电输运测量、磁测量、密度泛函理论计算和角分辨光电子能谱研究
AI.result: 常压下OsO2为顺磁性金属，具有费米液体行为；压力达到44GPa时发生金属-绝缘体转变；压力可增强Hubbard U值，驱动相变至altermagnetic态
AI.conclusion: 压力是调控OsO2磁基态的有效手段，为实现该材料的altermagnetism提供了途径

title: Bridging the lab-to-fab gap in non-fullerene organic solar cells via gravure printing
summary: Organic solar cells have reached record efficiencies with non-fullerene acceptors, yet their translation to industrial printing remains a critical bottleneck. Here we report the highest efficiency achieved for a fully roll-to-roll-compatible gravure-printed non-fullerene organic solar cell. High-performance blends are typically optimised under laboratory coating conditions, while roll-to-roll manufacturing imposes fundamentally different constraints on ink stability, drying dynamics, and multilayer integration. Whether these constraints intrinsically limit device physics has remained unresolved. Here, we demonstrate a gravure-printed PM6:Y12 solar cell architecture using commercially available materials and establish a quantitative framework that disentangles optical, recombination, and transport losses in printed devices. We find that favourable bulk morphology and exciton harvesting can be preserved under gravure printing and non-halogenated solvents. The dominant efficiency penalties arise instead from optical interference within the printed layer stack and slow charge transport. Our results demonstrate that the performance gap between laboratory and printed solar cells is originating from device architecture rather than the intrinsic physics of modern non-fullerene systems, providing a mechanistic roadmap for roll-to-roll manufacturing of non-fullerene solar cells.

AI.tldr: 该研究实现了全卷对卷兼容凹版印刷非富勒烯有机太阳能电池的最高效率，发现实验室与印刷电池间的性能差距主要源于器件架构而非材料本征物理限制。
AI.motivation: 非富勒烯有机太阳能电池在实验室条件下已达到高效率，但其向工业印刷的转化存在瓶颈。需要解决卷对卷制造对墨水稳定性、干燥动力学和多层集成的约束是否本质上限制了器件物理性能的问题。
AI.method: 使用商用材料PM6:Y12构建凹版印刷太阳能电池架构，建立定量框架分离印刷器件中的光学、复合和传输损耗。分析在非卤化溶剂下凹版印刷能否保持有利的体相形态和激子收集。
AI.result: 研究发现有利的体相形态和激子收集可以在凹版印刷和非卤化溶剂条件下保持。主要效率损失源于印刷层堆叠内的光学干涉和缓慢的电荷传输，而非材料本征物理限制。
AI.conclusion: 实验室与印刷太阳能电池的性能差距源于器件架构而非现代非富勒烯系统的本征物理特性，这为非富勒烯太阳能电池的卷对卷制造提供了机理路线图。

title: Signatures of Topological Superconductivity and Josephson Diode Effects on the Magnetocurrent-Phase Relation of Planar Josephson Junctions
summary: We present a theoretical study of proximitized planar Josephson junctions (JJs) with Rashba spin-orbit coupling (SOC) subject to an in-plane magnetic field and demonstrate that the magneto-current-phase relation (magneto-CPR) provides a powerful and unified probe of their microscopic and topological properties. By analyzing the full phase and Zeeman-field dependence of the supercurrent, we show that magneto-CPR measurements allow one to reconstruct the ground-state phase that minimizes the system's free energy in the absence of phase bias. This reconstructed phase generally displays 0-pi-like transitions as a function of the Zeeman energy, and we demonstrate that the magnitudes of the associated phase jumps provide quantitative information about the Rashba SOC. We further show that the mixed phase-field response encoded in the magneto-CPR enables the extraction of the second mixed spin susceptibility, which serves as a sensitive diagnostic of gap closings and can be used to construct a superconducting topological phase diagram in terms of the relative topological gap. In addition, the magneto-CPR yields the field dependence of the forward and reverse critical currents, allowing one to characterize the Josephson diode effect and its connection to the Zeeman field, Rashba SOC, and junction transparency. Our results establish magneto-CPR measurements as a versatile spectroscopic tool that can be used to extract key system parameters and provide evidence of topological superconducting phases in planar JJs.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出利用磁电流-相位关系（magneto-CPR）作为探测平面约瑟夫森结微观和拓扑特性的统一光谱工具，能够提取自旋轨道耦合、拓扑相变等关键参数。
AI.motivation: 需要一种统一且强大的方法来探测具有Rashba自旋轨道耦合的平面约瑟夫森结的微观和拓扑特性，特别是在存在面内磁场的情况下。
AI.method: 通过理论分析磁电流-相位关系的完整相位和塞曼场依赖性，重建系统在无相位偏置时的基态相位，提取第二混合自旋磁化率，并分析临界电流的场依赖性。
AI.result: 磁电流-相位关系测量能够重建显示0-π类转变的基态相位，其相位跳跃幅度提供Rashba自旋轨道耦合的定量信息，混合相场响应可用于构建超导拓扑相图，并能表征约瑟夫森二极管效应。
AI.conclusion: 磁电流-相位关系测量是一种多功能光谱工具，可用于提取关键系统参数并为平面约瑟夫森结中的拓扑超导相提供证据。

title: Thermal Hofstadter Butterflies
summary: Fractal electronic spectra arising from the competition between lattice periodicity and magnetic flux are a fundamental hallmark of two-dimensional quantum systems. While the spectral properties of Hofstadter butterflies are well documented, their thermodynamic response has remained remarkably unexplored. We present an original characterization of the electronic entropy $S_{e}$, and specific heat $C_{e}$, at half-filling, for square, honeycomb, and triangular lattices under a magnetic field. We demonstrate that these observables exhibit fast and slow magneto-thermo oscillations and pronounced magnetocaloric effects. We identify striking self-similarity in $S_e$ and $C_e$, tracing heart-shaped specific heat and tunnel-like entropy contours that repeat at specific lattice-dependent magnetic fluxes. Entropy minima at low temperatures play a remarkable role, acting as fingerprints for the butterfly spines, resolving the underlying fractal spectra. These findings may establish thermal measurements as high-resolution spectroscopic probes, providing a robust framework for recognizing fractal signatures through thermodynamics in diverse nanostructures.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次系统表征了霍夫斯塔特蝴蝶在方晶格、蜂窝晶格和三角晶格中的电子熵和比热，揭示了热力学量中的自相似性、磁热振荡效应，并证明低温熵最小值可作为蝴蝶谱的指纹特征。
AI.motivation: 虽然霍夫斯塔特蝴蝶的谱特性已有充分研究，但其热力学响应却鲜有探索。研究者希望填补这一空白，通过热力学测量来探测和识别分形电子谱的特征。
AI.method: 在磁场作用下，对方晶格、蜂窝晶格和三角晶格在半填充条件下进行电子熵和比热的计算分析，重点关注热力学量随磁场变化的振荡行为和自相似特征。
AI.result: 发现电子熵和比热呈现快速和慢速的磁热振荡，具有显著的自相似性；观察到心形比热轮廓和隧道状熵轮廓在特定磁通量下重复出现；低温熵最小值可精确识别蝴蝶谱的脊柱结构。
AI.conclusion: 热力学测量可作为高分辨率光谱探针，为识别纳米结构中的分形特征提供稳健框架，开辟了通过热力学探测量子系统分形性质的新途径。

title: Triplet-Pair Character of the $2^1A_g$ Dark State of Polyenes
summary: We define and calculate the triplet-pair population of the $2^1A_g$ dark state in polyenes, as predicted by the $π$-electron Pariser-Parr-Pople (PPP) model, for chains of 8 to 14 C-atoms and Coulomb interaction parameter between 4-14 eV. Our definition of the triplet-pair population is motivated by a two-particle model of the $2^1A_g$ state. We use DMRG to solve the PPP model and we exploit the MPS representation of the DMRG wavefunction to compute the triplet-pair population. Using our results for short chain sizes, we predict a finite-size scaling value of the triplet-pair population of ca. 75% for realistic Coulomb interactions for polyene chains. Our results agree with other theoretical work on the doubly-excited character of polyenes, and represents further evidence that the $2^1A_g$ state is predominantly triplet-pair in character - with implications for singlet fission mechanisms in polyenes.

AI.tldr: 使用DMRG计算PPP模型中聚烯烃2^1A_g暗态的三重态对布居，预测实际库仑相互作用下三重态对布居约为75%，表明该态主要为三重态对特征。
AI.motivation: 研究聚烯烃中2^1A_g暗态的三重态对布居，这对于理解聚烯烃中的单重态裂变机制具有重要意义。
AI.method: 使用密度矩阵重整化群(DMRG)求解π电子Pariser-Parr-Pople(PPP)模型，利用DMRG波函数的矩阵乘积态(MPS)表示计算三重态对布居，分析8-14个碳原子的链长和4-14 eV库仑相互作用参数。
AI.result: 基于短链尺寸结果预测，实际库仑相互作用下聚烯烃链的三重态对布居有限尺寸标度值约为75%，与其他理论工作一致。
AI.conclusion: 2^1A_g态主要为三重态对特征，这对聚烯烃中的单重态裂变机制具有重要启示。

title: Bistability of electron temperature in atomically thin semiconductors in the presence of exciton photogeneration
summary: We study the dynamic equilibrium between trions and excitons in monolayers of transition metal dichalcogenides in the presence of resident charge carriers and continuous photogeneration of excitons. We show that heating of the system via Drude absorption of low-frequency radiation leads to bistability of the steady-state equilibrium. The first is a low-temperature state, in which almost all resident charge carriers are bound into trions. The second state occurs at high temperatures, where most trions are dissociated; in this regime, the heating is more efficient due to the higher Drude conductivity of unbound charge carriers compared to trions. Switching between these two states occurs on a timescale of tens to hundreds of picoseconds and is accompanied by a jump in various observables such as temperature, current, and the intensity of exciton or trion luminescence.

AI.tldr: 研究过渡金属二硫化物单层中三子与激子在存在残留载流子和连续光生激子情况下的动态平衡，发现低频辐射的Drude吸收加热会导致稳态平衡的双稳态现象
AI.motivation: 研究过渡金属二硫化物单层中三子与激子的动态平衡机制，特别是在存在残留载流子和连续光生激子条件下，探索系统加热对平衡状态的影响
AI.method: 通过分析Drude吸收低频辐射导致的系统加热效应，研究三子与激子之间的稳态平衡，考虑残留载流子的存在和连续光生激子过程
AI.result: 发现系统存在两种稳态：低温态（大部分残留载流子结合成三子）和高温态（大部分三子解离），加热效率在高温态更高，状态切换时间尺度为数十到数百皮秒
AI.conclusion: 过渡金属二硫化物单层中三子与激子的动态平衡在Drude加热作用下呈现双稳态特性，状态切换伴随温度、电流和发光强度的跳跃变化

title: AIMD-L: An automated laboratory for high-throughput characterization of structural materials for extreme environments
summary:
Rapid developments in artificial intelligence and machine learning as applied to materials science are creating an urgent need for experimental data, which can be provided by high-throughput and autonomous laboratories. To date most demonstrations of such laboratories have focused on functional materials, with less attention paid to structural materials. We present here the Artificial Intelligence in Materials Design Laboratory (AIMD-L), an automated, high-throughput facility for characterizing the microstructure and properties of structural metals and ceramics, with an emphasis on materials in extreme environments.
  AIMD-L has two custom instruments for characterization of structural materials: HELIX for shock studies of materials, and MAXIMA for X-ray diffraction and X-ray fluorescence spectroscopy. Specifically designed for high-throughput studies, HELIX and MAXIMA are each capable of collecting data at rates two to three orders of magnitude faster than conventional systems. A third experimental station, SPHINX, is a commercial nanoindenter modified for integration into the automated workflow of AIMD-L. A user (which may be human or an AI agent) directs the experiments to be carried out by means of a centralized control program. The experimental stations are linked by a conveyance that moves samples around the lab, with a robot at each station for sample transfer in/out of the instrument. The experimental stations also communicate with a common data layer that streams data autonomously from each instrument to a data portal, where their arrival triggers automated workflows for data reduction and analysis. The processed data are immediately available to the human operator or agentic AI, forming a closed loop for rapid decision-making and experimental control.

AI.tldr: 研究人员开发了AIMD-L自动化高通量实验室，专门用于结构材料的微观结构和性能表征，特别关注极端环境下的材料研究。
AI.motivation: 人工智能和机器学习在材料科学中的应用快速发展，迫切需要实验数据支持。目前大多数自动化实验室主要关注功能材料，而对结构材料的关注较少。
AI.method: 建立了AIMD-L自动化实验室，包含三个主要设备：HELIX用于材料冲击研究，MAXIMA用于X射线衍射和荧光光谱分析，SPHINX用于纳米压痕测试。通过集中控制程序、自动化样品传输系统和数据流处理层实现闭环实验控制。
AI.result: HELIX和MAXIMA的数据采集速度比传统系统快2-3个数量级。建立了完整的自动化工作流程，包括样品传输、数据采集、自动处理和分析，实现了人机协同的快速决策闭环。
AI.conclusion: AIMD-L为结构材料研究提供了高效的高通量自动化平台，特别适用于极端环境下的材料表征，填补了结构材料自动化实验室的空白，支持人工智能驱动的材料设计研究。

title: ETHER: An Efficient Tool for Monte Carlo Simulations of Magnetic Systems
summary: Monte Carlo (MC) simulations are powerful computational tools for investigating thermodynamic behavior and validating analytical approaches in complex physical systems. Here we present ETHER (Efficient Tool for THermodynamics Exploration via Relaxations), an open-source MC simulation package, developed for studying temperature-dependent magnetic properties in spin systems. ETHER enables large-scale MC simulations of various spin systems to analyze phase transitions, critical behavior, and complex magnetic structures. The package constructs spin-lattice networks from standard structural input files and supports exchange interaction definitions through user-specified neighbor lists. It also provides tools for easy visualization and post-processing of simulation outputs. Our code has been benchmarked thoroughly against results reported in the literature for common representative magnetic systems. This user-friendly code offers researchers a versatile platform for exploring thermodynamic properties of complex magnetic systems.

AI.tldr: ETHER是一个开源的蒙特卡洛模拟软件包，专门用于研究自旋系统的温度依赖磁性性质，支持大规模模拟相变、临界行为和复杂磁结构。
AI.motivation: 蒙特卡洛模拟是研究复杂物理系统热力学行为和验证分析方法的强大工具，但需要一个专门针对磁性系统研究的开源、用户友好的模拟平台。
AI.method: 开发ETHER开源软件包，支持从标准结构输入文件构建自旋晶格网络，通过用户指定的邻居列表定义交换相互作用，提供可视化工具和后处理功能。
AI.result: 代码已通过对常见代表性磁性系统的文献结果进行彻底基准测试，验证了其准确性和可靠性。
AI.conclusion: ETHER为研究人员提供了一个多功能平台，用于探索复杂磁性系统的热力学性质，具有用户友好性和广泛适用性。

title: Enhancement of metallicity by Na doping in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_{7+δ}$
summary: The observation of high-$T_c$ superconductivity in bilayer nickelate La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ under high pressure provides a new venue for exploring novel unconventional superconductors and elucidating the mechanism of high-$T_c$ superconductivity. Subsequently, numerous chemical substitution studies have been reported, aiming to stabilize superconductivity at ambient pressure, or significantly reduce the pressure threshold required for its occurrence. Here, we report the comprehensive study on sodium (Na) doping in the Ruddlesden-Popper nickelate La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_{7+δ}$, where Na$^+$ substitutes for La$^{3+}$ at the A-site with varying doping concentrations. The structural, thermal, magnetic, and electronic transport properties of as-synthesized polycrystalline samples were systematically investigated. X-ray diffraction (XRD) analysis reveals that Na doping induces a structural transition from the '327' Amam phase to the '4310' Bmab phase when $x\geq0.075$, which is further corroborated by thermogravimetric analysis (TGA) measurements. Substitution of La$^{3+}$ with Na$^+$ gives rise to a gradual expansion of the '327' phase lattice. Meanwhile, resistivity measurements indicate that the density wave (DW) transition is marginally suppressed and metallicity is significantly enhanced. Upon the application of pressure, DW transition can be further suppressed, whereas the low-$T$ insulating behaviors remain insensitive to pressure. These results offer critical insights into the roles of elemental substitution and charge carrier doping in steering the competing electronic phases in layered nickelates.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过在Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇₊δ中进行钠(Na)掺杂，探索了A位元素取代对结构和电子性质的影响，发现Na掺杂诱导了从'Amam'相到'Bmab'相的结构转变，并显著增强了金属性。
AI.motivation: 高压下双层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇中观察到的高温超导性为探索新型非常规超导体和阐明高温超导机制提供了新平台。化学取代研究旨在稳定常压下的超导性或显著降低其发生所需的压力阈值。
AI.method: 在Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇₊δ中进行钠(Na)掺杂，Na⁺取代A位的La³⁺，系统研究不同掺杂浓度下多晶样品的结构、热学、磁学和电子输运性质，包括X射线衍射、热重分析、电阻率测量和高压实验。
AI.result: Na掺杂(x≥0.075)诱导了从'327' Amam相到'4310' Bmab相的结构转变；Na取代导致'327'相晶格逐渐膨胀；密度波转变被轻微抑制，金属性显著增强；高压下密度波转变进一步被抑制，但低温绝缘行为对压力不敏感。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为元素取代和电荷载流子掺杂在调控层状镍酸盐中竞争电子相的作用提供了关键见解，有助于理解镍酸盐超导体的物理机制。

title: Non-Markovian heat production in ultrafast phonon dynamics
summary: High-intensity THz laser pulses enable the light-mediated control of lattice vibrations by resonantly driving selected phonon modes. On ultrafast timescales, memory effects influence the phonon dynamics and must be accounted for to describe the heat production associated with energy dissipation. Here, we establish a microscopic framework for non-Markovian phonon dynamics by deriving the noise and dissipation kernels governing a driven phonon mode. Using large-scale molecular dynamics simulations, we reconstruct these kernels directly from the many-body lattice dynamics and determine the corresponding heat production rate. Our results provide a quantitative picture of the crossover between Markovian and non-Markovian dynamics on picosecond timescales and show how the finite bandwidth of the driving field limits the dynamically relevant bath spectrum. Furthermore, we demonstrate that thermodynamic quantities such as heat production can be inferred directly from the dynamics of an individual phonon mode, enabling their experimental measurement using time-resolved spectroscopy.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了非马尔可夫声子动力学的微观框架，通过分子动力学模拟重构噪声和耗散核，量化了皮秒时间尺度上马尔可夫与非马尔可夫动力学的交叉，并展示了如何从单个声子模式动力学推断热产生等热力学量。
AI.motivation: 高强度太赫兹激光脉冲能够通过共振驱动特定声子模式实现对晶格振动的光控。在超快时间尺度上，记忆效应会影响声子动力学，必须考虑这些效应来描述能量耗散相关的热产生。
AI.method: 建立非马尔可夫声子动力学的微观框架，推导驱动声子模式的噪声和耗散核。使用大规模分子动力学模拟直接从多体晶格动力学重构这些核，并确定相应的热产生速率。
AI.result: 量化了皮秒时间尺度上马尔可夫与非马尔可夫动力学的交叉，展示了驱动场有限带宽如何限制动态相关的浴谱。证明热产生等热力学量可以直接从单个声子模式的动力学推断，使其能够通过时间分辨光谱进行实验测量。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解超快时间尺度上的非马尔可夫声子动力学提供了定量框架，展示了如何从单个模式动力学提取热力学信息，为实验测量能量耗散过程开辟了新途径。

title: Hitherto unrecognized intermolecular Coulombic decay mechanism in gases
summary: Excited atoms and molecules can utilize their excess energy to ionize a neighboring system by a process named interatomic and intermolecular Coulombic decay (ICD). ICD is ultrafast, in the femtosecond regime, and has many modes of appearance. Ample applications of ICD have been reported spanning a wide range of fields and it is expected to be ubiquitous in nature. Essentially all the investigations on ICD were for weakly bound systems, like clusters and fluids. We demonstrate that, unexpectedly, ICD can be efficiently active in atomic and molecular gases in spite of the very large distances between the units. We uncover the underlying mechanism, which differs from that prevailing in weakly bound systems. The dynamics of ICD in gases is analyzed. The results considerably broaden the impact of ICD and open the gateway to new kinds of applications.

AI.tldr: ICD（分子间库仑衰变）不仅存在于弱束缚系统（如团簇和液体），还能在原子和分子气体中高效发生，尽管粒子间距很大，这扩展了ICD的应用范围。
AI.motivation: 传统认为ICD主要发生在弱束缚系统（如团簇和流体）中，但本文旨在探索ICD是否也能在原子和分子气体中发生，尽管气体中粒子间距很大。
AI.method: 通过揭示与弱束缚系统中不同的新机制，分析气体中ICD的动力学过程，证明ICD在气体环境中的有效性。
AI.result: 意外发现ICD可以在原子和分子气体中高效发生，尽管粒子间距很大，并揭示了与弱束缚系统不同的新机制。
AI.conclusion: ICD的影响范围被大大扩展，为新型应用打开了大门，ICD在自然界中可能比之前认为的更为普遍。

title: Hybrid light-matter excitations and spontaneous time-reversal symmetry breaking in two-dimensional Josephson Junctions
summary: In the context of hybrid superconductor-semiconductor systems, Josephson junctions based on two-dimensional materials, such as graphene, offer promising opportunities because of their scalability and gate-tunable electronic properties. In this work, we investigate the inductive coupling between a quantum LC resonator and a superconducting loop embedding a short, ballistic, planar Josephson junction, with the graphene-based case as a representative example. Within a mean-field formalism, we analyze how the properties of the global system depend on the light-matter interaction coupling, the Fermi level of the two-dimensional material, and temperature. Our findings reveal that the current-phase relation can show features indicative of spontaneous time-reversal symmetry breaking. Furthermore, starting from the mean-field theory, we determine the low-energy spectrum of collective hybridized light-matter excitations.

AI.tldr: 研究石墨烯基约瑟夫森结与量子LC谐振器的耦合系统，发现光-物质相互作用可导致自发时间反演对称性破缺，并分析了混合激发谱。
AI.motivation: 二维材料（如石墨烯）约瑟夫森结具有可扩展性和栅极可调特性，为混合超导-半导体系统提供了有前景的平台。研究此类结与量子谐振器的耦合，可探索光-物质相互作用的新物理现象。
AI.method: 采用平均场理论，分析短弹道平面约瑟夫森结（以石墨烯为例）嵌入超导环与量子LC谐振器的电感耦合。研究耦合强度、二维材料费米能级和温度对系统性质的影响。
AI.result: 电流-相位关系显示出自发时间反演对称性破缺的特征。从平均场理论出发，确定了集体混合光-物质激发的低能谱。
AI.conclusion: 石墨烯基约瑟夫森结与量子谐振器的耦合系统展现出丰富的物理现象，包括自发对称性破缺和混合激发态，为量子信息处理和基础物理研究提供了新平台。

title: Adsorption-Controlled Epitaxy and Twin Control of $γ$-GaSe on GaAs (111)B
summary: The III-Se layered semiconductors, including InSe and GaSe, are promising optoelectronic materials due to their relatively high electron mobilities at room temperature, nonlinear optical responses, ferroelectricity, self-passivated van der Waals surfaces, and ability to alloy and synthesize heterostructures for bandgap engineering. Adsorption control is a widely utilized strategy for controlling the stoichiometry and phase formation of these materials; however, the bounds of the adsorption-controlled growth window for GaSe have not been systematically established. Additionally, challenges with control over polytype and twinning remain. Here, we use molecular beam epitaxy to experimentally map the adsorption-controlled growth window of GaSe films on vicinal GaAs (111)B substrates. The observed phase boundaries show qualitative agreement with Ellingham diagram predictions. All films crystallize in the $γ$ ($R3m$) polytype. Increasing growth and annealing temperature leads to decreased mosaicity measured by x-ray rocking curve and smoother surfaces measured by atomic force microscopy, at the expense of a transition from singly oriented $γ$ to twinned $γ$ with $60\degree$ rotated domains.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分子束外延实验绘制了GaSe薄膜在GaAs衬底上的吸附控制生长窗口，发现提高生长和退火温度可改善晶体质量但会导致孪晶形成
AI.motivation: III-Se层状半导体材料具有优异的光电性能，但GaSe的吸附控制生长窗口尚未系统建立，且多晶型和孪晶控制仍是挑战
AI.method: 使用分子束外延在GaAs(111)B衬底上实验绘制GaSe薄膜的吸附控制生长窗口，通过X射线摇摆曲线和原子力显微镜表征晶体质量和表面形貌
AI.result: 观察到的相边界与Ellingham图预测定性一致，所有薄膜均结晶为γ多晶型，提高生长和退火温度可降低镶嵌度、改善表面平整度，但会导致从单取向γ向60°旋转孪晶域的转变
AI.conclusion: 系统建立了GaSe的吸附控制生长窗口，揭示了生长温度对晶体质量和孪晶形成的影响，为优化GaSe薄膜生长提供了重要指导

title: Spin Group Symmetry Criteria For Unconventional Magnetism
summary: Unconventional magnetism has typically been classified into two fundamental classes: even-parity magnets (EPMs) and odd-parity magnets (OPMs).
