These two classes exhibit identical and opposite spin splittings, respectively, under momentum inversion, while both maintain symmetry-compensated magnetization. In this Letter, we present a unified spin space group-based framework that establishes comprehensive symmetry criteria for both classes. Our framework not only yields a complete classification of EPMs and OPMs but also uncovers a wealth of new symmetry-driven mechanisms for them. Specifically, we classify both classes into three types based on their spin textures: collinear (type-I), coplanar (type-II), and noncoplanar (type-III), and we demonstrate that both classes can be realized across collinear, coplanar, and noncoplanar magnetic orders. We identify eight distinct symmetry-driven mechanisms for OPMs and seven for EPMs, among which some paradigms of unconventional magnetism, for instance, altermagnets naturally emerge as one specific mechanism of EPMs. Using these established criteria, we identify numerous candidate materials from the Magndata database, realizing some new symmetry mechanisms for OPMs and EPMs. Our work establishes a foundational symmetry framework for understanding, predicting, and designing unconventional magnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了基于自旋空间群的统一框架，对非常规磁体（偶宇称磁体和奇宇称磁体）进行完整分类，揭示了新的对称性驱动机制，并识别出多种候选材料。
AI.motivation: 非常规磁体通常分为偶宇称磁体（EPMs）和奇宇称磁体（OPMs）两类，但缺乏统一的对称性框架来全面分类和理解这些磁体。需要建立系统的对称性标准来预测和设计新型磁性材料。
AI.method: 基于自旋空间群构建统一框架，建立全面的对称性标准。将两类磁体根据自旋纹理分为三类（I型：共线，II型：共面，III型：非共面），识别出OPMs的8种和EPMs的7种对称性驱动机制。
AI.result: 建立了完整的EPMs和OPMs分类体系，发现了新的对称性驱动机制（如altermagnets作为EPMs的一种特定机制）。从Magndata数据库中识别出多种候选材料，实现了OPMs和EPMs的一些新对称性机制。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解、预测和设计非常规磁性材料建立了基础的对称性框架，统一了偶宇称磁体和奇宇称磁体的分类，揭示了丰富的对称性驱动机制。

title: On the estimating the superconducting volume fraction from the internal magnetic susceptibility
summary: Zhang et al.$^1$ reported zero-field cooled (ZFC) and field cooled (FC) data measured in a highly compressed $Pr_4Ni_3O_{10}$ single crystal. These measurements provide unambiguous confirmation of bulk superconductivity in pressurized Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates. Zhang et al.$^1$ applied an equation (described in Refs.$^{2,3}$) to recalculate ZFC data measured in a $Pr_4Ni_3O_{10}$ (sample S3) in volume fraction $f$ of the superconducting phase in the sample. In result$^1$, $f = 0.85$ was reported for sample S3 at pressure P = 40.2 GPa. The key postulate of the methodology for the calculation of $f$ (see also works$^{4-6}$) is that $f$ is equal to the amplitude of the internal magnetic susceptibility $\vert χ_{internal} \vert $, or $ f = \vert χ_{internal} \vert $. Here we argue that this postulate is incorrect and present counterexample where the $Pr_4Ni_3O_{10}$ sample S3 can exhibit $f < 0.10$ and $\vert χ_{internal} \vert = 0.82 $. In the result, we addressed recent Replies$^{2,3}$ on our Comments$^{7,8}$. Considering that the postulate $ f = \vert χ_{internal} \vert $ is widely used in superconductivity, we extend our request to reconsider the validity of this postulate in the entire field of superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑超导研究中广泛使用的假设 f = |χ_internal|，指出该假设不正确，并通过Pr₄Ni₃O₁₀样品S3的反例证明f < 0.10时|χ_internal|仍可达0.82
AI.motivation: 针对Zhang等人使用f = |χ_internal|假设计算Pr₄Ni₃O₁₀样品中超导相体积分数的方法提出质疑，该假设在超导领域被广泛使用但可能存在问题
AI.method: 通过理论分析和反例论证，展示Pr₄Ni₃O₁₀样品S3在f < 0.10时|χ_internal|仍可达0.82的情况，从而证明f = |χ_internal|假设不成立
AI.result: 证明了f = |χ_internal|这一广泛使用的假设是错误的，Pr₄Ni₃O₁₀样品S3可以出现f < 0.10而|χ_internal| = 0.82的情况
AI.conclusion: 需要重新评估f = |χ_internal|假设在整个超导研究领域的有效性，该假设可能误导超导相体积分数的计算

title: Stochastic Loop Corrections to Belief Propagation for Tensor Network Contraction
summary: Tensor network contraction is a fundamental computational challenge underlying quantum many-body physics, statistical mechanics, and machine learning. Belief propagation (BP) provides an efficient approximate solution, but introduces systematic errors on graphs with loops. Here, we introduce a hybrid method that achieves exact results by stochastically sampling loop corrections to BP and showcase our method by applying it to the two-dimensional ferromagnetic Ising model. For any pairwise Markov random field with symmetric edge potentials, our approach exploits an exact factorization of the partition function into the BP contribution and a loop correction factor summing over all valid loop configurations, weighted by edge weights derived directly from the potentials. We sample this sum using Markov chain Monte Carlo with moves that preserve the loop constraint, combined with umbrella sampling to ensure efficient exploration across all correlation strengths. Our stochastic approach provides unbiased estimates with controllable statistical error in any parameter regime.

AI.tldr: 提出一种混合方法，通过随机采样环修正来精确计算张量网络收缩，应用于二维铁磁伊辛模型，结合BP近似和MCMC采样实现无偏估计。
AI.motivation: 张量网络收缩是量子多体物理、统计力学和机器学习的基础计算挑战。信念传播（BP）在环状图上存在系统误差，需要精确方法解决。
AI.method: 提出混合方法：将配分函数精确分解为BP贡献和环修正因子之和，使用MCMC采样环配置，结合伞形采样确保不同相关强度下的高效探索。
AI.result: 方法在二维铁磁伊辛模型上展示，能够提供无偏估计，统计误差可控，适用于任何参数区域。
AI.conclusion: 该随机方法结合了BP的高效性和精确采样的准确性，为具有环状结构的马尔可夫随机场提供了通用的精确计算框架。

title: Improved SABRE hyperpolarisation using pulse sequences to reduce effective coupling
summary: Hyperpolarisation using Signal Amplification By Reversible Exchange (SABRE) is a convenient method for high repeatability studies. The core of this technique is polarisation transfer to the target substrate during an on-going chemical exchange process. Typically, polarisation transfer is achieved as fast as possible. In this study we employ NMR sequences that on contrary slow down the polarisation transfer and yet demonstrate improved performance. Simulations confirm that such methods can lead to high polarisation yield in SABRE system that exhibit higher magnetic inequivalence and lower chemical exchange rate.

AI.tldr: 研究提出通过减慢极化转移速度而非传统加速方法，在SABRE系统中实现更高极化效率的新策略
AI.motivation: 传统SABRE技术追求快速极化转移，但某些系统具有较高磁不等价性和较低化学交换速率，需要新方法来提高极化效率
AI.method: 采用NMR序列减慢极化转移过程，通过模拟验证在磁不等价性较高、化学交换速率较低的SABRE系统中的性能
AI.result: 减慢极化转移的方法在特定SABRE系统中表现出改进的性能，能够实现更高的极化产率
AI.conclusion: 与传统快速极化转移方法相反，适当减慢极化转移过程可以在特定条件下提高SABRE系统的极化效率，为高磁不等价性、低交换速率系统提供了新优化策略

title: Correlations Between the Dielectric Properties, Domain Structure Morphology and Phase State of Bi1-xSmxFeO3 Nanoparticles
summary: Nanoscale multiferroics are basic model objects for studying polar, magnetic and magnetoelectric properties and mutual couplings. Bismuth-samarium ferrite (Bi1-xSmxFeO3) is a model orthoferrite, whose polar, magnetic and magnetoelectric properties have been studied for the bulk and thin film samples. The properties of Bi1-xSmxFeO3 nanoparticles have been much less studied, despite the nanoparticles can be used in a wide range of applications, such as energy storage, magnetic hyperthermia and advanced nanoelectronics. In this work we performed experimental measurements and analysis of the temperature dependence of the Bi1-xSmxFeO3 nanopowders dielectric properties. Calculations of the ferro-ionic coupling influence on the dielectric properties, domain structure morphology and phase states are performed in the framework of the Ginzburg-Landau-Devonshire-Stephenson-Highland approach. Theoretical results explain the main trends of experimentally observed temperature dependences of the effective dielectric permittivity, which allows us to understand the correlations between the temperature behavior of dielectric properties, domain structure morphology and phase state of Bi1-xSmxFeO3 nanoparticles.

AI.tldr: 研究Bi1-xSmxFeO3纳米颗粒的介电性质温度依赖性，通过实验测量和理论计算揭示介电性质、畴结构形态和相态之间的关联。
AI.motivation: 纳米多铁材料是研究极性、磁性和磁电性质及其耦合的基本模型。Bi1-xSmxFeO3纳米颗粒的性质研究较少，尽管在能量存储、磁热疗和先进纳米电子学中有广泛应用潜力。
AI.method: 实验测量Bi1-xSmxFeO3纳米粉末介电性质的温度依赖性，同时采用Ginzburg-Landau-Devonshire-Stephenson-Highland方法理论计算铁离子耦合对介电性质、畴结构形态和相态的影响。
AI.result: 理论结果解释了实验观察到的有效介电常数温度依赖性的主要趋势，揭示了介电性质温度行为、畴结构形态和Bi1-xSmxFeO3纳米颗粒相态之间的相关性。
AI.conclusion: 通过实验和理论相结合的方法，成功理解了Bi1-xSmxFeO3纳米颗粒介电性质、畴结构和相态之间的内在关联，为纳米多铁材料的应用提供了理论基础。

title: Weyl excitonic condensation
summary: We consider a half-filled two-dimensional Su-Schrieffer-Heeger lattice and examine the role of the long-range Coulomb electron-hole attractive interaction. We demonstrate that, under specific conditions, a rare interplay of topological and excitonic-collective behavior emerges as a novel state of matter. A unique Bose-Einstein condensate of excitons forms, exhibiting co-presence of pseudo-spin chiral texture. The emerging complex order-parameter, a particle-hole pairing-gap, has non-zero real and imaginary parts throughout the Brillouin zone (BZ) but vanish separately on two different nodal lines, which intersect at two Weyl points. The Weyl nodes possess opposite pseudo-spin chiralities, which act as source and drain of a Berry-flux associated with the particle-hole pairing-wavefunction, and are the cause of Bogoliubov-deGennes Fermi-arc edge-states. We self-consistently calculate the full momentum-dependence of the particle-hole pairing gap throughout the entire BZ. Near the Weyl points, the pairing gap exhibits the unconventional time-reversal-symmetry breaking $p_x+ip_y$ character. Finally, we discuss general potential experimental realizations of this novel state of matter.

AI.tldr: 在二维SSH晶格中，长程库仑电子-空穴吸引相互作用导致拓扑与激子集体行为的罕见交织，形成具有伪自旋手性纹理的激子玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚态。
AI.motivation: 研究二维Su-Schrieffer-Heeger晶格中长程库仑电子-空穴吸引相互作用的作用，探索拓扑与激子集体行为交织产生的新物质态。
AI.method: 考虑半填充二维SSH晶格，分析长程库仑电子-空穴吸引相互作用，自洽计算整个布里渊区的粒子-空穴配对能隙动量依赖性。
AI.result: 发现激子玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚态与伪自旋手性纹理共存，配对能隙在布里渊区具有非零实部和虚部，但在两条不同节点线上分别消失，交点形成两个具有相反伪自旋手性的外尔点，导致Bogoliubov-deGennes费米弧边缘态。
AI.conclusion: 在特定条件下，拓扑与激子集体行为的交织产生了一种新型物质态，具有外尔点和费米弧边缘态等拓扑特征，为实验实现提供了理论基础。

title: Magnetic landscape of NbTiN superconducting resonators under radio-frequency excitation
summary: Planar superconducting resonators are essential components in quantum circuits and highly sensitive sensors. However, their performance is often compromised by magnetic flux penetration, as the interaction of flux quanta and the induced radio-frequency (RF) currents in the superconducting thin film leads to significant energy dissipation. At low operating temperatures, this issue is aggravated as thermomagnetic instabilities can trigger the sudden propagation of magnetic flux avalanches. An important open question is whether the RF excitation itself stimulates the nucleation and propagation of magnetic flux avalanches in the superconducting thin film. The literature remains inconclusive on this point, partly due to the lack of compelling evidence for this phenomenon. In this work, we address this issue by unprecedented direct visualization of magnetic flux penetration through Faraday rotation imaging under simultaneous RF excitation. We demonstrate that the avalanche activity exhibits a weak dependence on the RF intensity for RF excitations within the linear Campbell regime. However, magnetic flux bursts clearly influence the RF transmission properties of the device. Furthermore, it is possible to unambiguously associate a particular avalanche event with a jump in resonance frequency. This enables us to identify the loci of most deleterious events and understand the distinct origins of upward and downward frequency shifts. These observations are supported by electromagnetic simulations in which local changes of the kinetic inductance mimic flux avalanches and confirm the invasive character of the MOI technique. The insights gained from this study aim to contribute to the broader understanding of the magnetic resilience of superconducting resonators, with the goal of improving their efficiency and stability.

AI.tldr: 通过法拉第旋转成像直接可视化射频激发下的磁通穿透，发现磁通雪崩活动对射频强度依赖较弱，但雪崩事件会显著影响器件射频传输特性，并能明确关联特定雪崩事件与谐振频率跳变。
AI.motivation: 平面超导谐振器在量子电路和高灵敏度传感器中至关重要，但其性能常受磁通穿透影响。射频激发是否会刺激超导薄膜中磁通雪崩的成核和传播，文献中尚无定论，缺乏该现象的直接证据。
AI.method: 采用前所未有的直接可视化方法，通过法拉第旋转成像在同步射频激发下观察磁通穿透。结合电磁模拟，其中局部动感变化模拟磁通雪崩，并验证磁光成像技术的侵入特性。
AI.result: 在线性Campbell区域内的射频激发下，雪崩活动对射频强度依赖较弱；磁通爆发明显影响器件射频传输特性；能明确关联特定雪崩事件与谐振频率跳变；识别了最有害事件的位置并理解频率上下偏移的不同起源。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解超导谐振器的磁弹性提供了新见解，有助于提高其效率和稳定性。直接可视化方法解决了射频激发是否刺激磁通雪崩这一长期未决的问题。

title: Understanding halide segregation in metal halide perovskites through defect thermodynamics
comment: 25 pages, 6 figures + 13 pages of Supporting Information
summary: Halide segregation in metal halide perovskites limits their bandgap tunability and hinders their adoption in tandem solar cells and light emitting diodes. Here, we reveal the thermodynamic driving force behind halide segregation in mixed halide (Br-I) perovskites. By performing first-principles calculations on slab models with varying bromide and iodide distributions, we demonstrate that bromide ions preferentially occupy surface sites over bulk sites. Our simulations show that the segregation tendency is higher in MAPb(Br$_x$I$_{1-x}$)$_3$ (MA=methylammonium) compared to FA$_{0.8}$Cs$_{0.2}$Pb(Br$_x$I$_{1-x}$)$_3$, highlighting the role of the A-site cation. To quantify this effect, we establish a descriptor for halide segregation: the difference in defect formation energies of Br antisite defects between the bulk and the surface, which confirms the role of the A-site cation at equimolar Br-I concentration. Furthermore, we identify the localization of photo-generated holes near iodide ions, which triggers their oxidation and accelerates the formation of iodide vacancies, thereby promoting segregation. Overall, this work establishes defect thermodynamics as a framework for understanding halide segregation and provides a structural basis for designing stable mixed halide perovskites.

AI.tldr: 该研究揭示了混合卤化物钙钛矿中卤化物分离的热力学驱动力，发现溴离子优先占据表面位点，A位阳离子影响分离倾向，并建立了卤化物分离的描述符。
AI.motivation: 混合卤化物钙钛矿中的卤化物分离限制了其带隙可调性，阻碍了其在串联太阳能电池和发光二极管中的应用，需要理解其热力学驱动力。
AI.method: 通过第一性原理计算研究不同溴化物和碘化物分布的板模型，比较MAPb(Br_xI_{1-x})_3和FA_{0.8}Cs_{0.2}Pb(Br_xI_{1-x})_3，建立卤化物分离的描述符（体相与表面Br反位缺陷形成能差）。
AI.result: 溴离子优先占据表面位点；MAPb(Br_xI_{1-x})_3比FA_{0.8}Cs_{0.2}Pb(Br_xI_{1-x})_3具有更高的分离倾向；光生空穴在碘离子附近局域化会触发氧化并加速碘空位形成，促进分离。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了缺陷热力学作为理解卤化物分离的框架，为设计稳定的混合卤化物钙钛矿提供了结构基础。

title: Spin-selective elliptic optical dichroism and perfectly spin-polarized third-order nonlinear photocurrent in altermagnets
summary: It is shown that the low-energy theory of a $d$-wave altermagnet is characterized by anisotropic Dirac cones with up and down spins based on a recently proposed tight-binding model. Spin-selective perfect elliptic dichroism occurs in this system, where only up-spin or down-spin electrons are excited by elliptically polarized light. Then, we derive a formula for the third-order photocurrent induced by applying both elliptically polarized light and static electric field, which is described in terms of quantum metric and the Berry curvature. Based on it, we predict only up-spin polarized current is induced. It is the leading order of photocurrent because the second-order photocurrent such as the injection current and the shift current are prohibited due to inversion symmetry inherent to altermagnets. It is intriguing that nonzero photocurrent is induced only by the anisotropy of the Dirac cones. Our results will be useful for future photo-excited spintronics based on altermagnets.

AI.tldr: d波交变磁体低能理论具有各向异性狄拉克锥，产生自旋选择性完美椭圆二向色性，并预测了由椭圆偏振光和静电场诱导的三阶光电流，该电流仅由狄拉克锥的各向异性驱动。
AI.motivation: 研究交变磁体的光激发特性，探索其在未来光激发自旋电子学中的应用潜力。交变磁体具有独特的自旋轨道耦合特性，可能产生新颖的光电响应。
AI.method: 基于最近提出的紧束缚模型，分析d波交变磁体的低能理论，推导椭圆偏振光和静电场诱导的三阶光电流公式，该公式用量子度量和贝里曲率描述。
AI.result: 发现系统具有自旋选择性完美椭圆二向色性，仅特定自旋电子能被椭圆偏振光激发。预测仅产生上自旋极化电流，且该三阶光电流是主导项，因为二阶光电流（如注入电流和位移电流）由于交变磁体的反演对称性而被禁止。
AI.conclusion: 交变磁体中非零光电流仅由狄拉克锥的各向异性驱动，这一发现对未来基于交变磁体的光激发自旋电子学应用具有重要意义。

title: Universal electronic manifolds for extrapolative alloy discovery
summary: This study presents a computationally efficient framework for accelerated alloy discovery that uses the non-interacting electron density to capture intrinsic structure-property relationships in refractory high-entropy alloys (HEAs). Unlike state-of-the-art approaches relying on expensive, self-consistent density functional theory calculations, our method employs the non-interacting electron density as the primary structural descriptor. By extracting physical features through directionally resolved two-point spatial correlations and compressing them via Principal Component Analysis, we efficiently map the design space. Coupling these descriptors with Bayesian active learning, we achieve a normalized mean absolute error (NMAE) of <2% for the bulk modulus of Al-Nb-Ti-Zr alloys using only 10 training samples. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the model learns an electronic packing manifold that is transferable across distinct chemical species within refractory HEAs. Validated on a distinct 7-component refractory system (Mo-Nb-Ta-Ti-V-W-Zr) containing four elements entirely absent from the training data, the framework enables rigorous zero-shot extrapolation. Moreover, by augmenting the base model with just 20 samples from the target domain, we achieve high-fidelity predictions (NMAE < 3%) for 7-component alloys, reducing data acquisition costs by orders of magnitude compared to standard workflows. These results establish the non-interacting electron density as a rigorous, extrapolative descriptor for vast compositional landscapes.

AI.tldr: 提出基于非相互作用电子密度的高效框架，用于加速高熵合金发现，仅需少量训练样本即可实现高精度预测和跨体系迁移学习。
AI.motivation: 传统基于密度泛函理论的计算方法成本高昂，限制了高熵合金的快速发现。需要开发更高效的计算框架来捕捉合金的结构-性能关系。
AI.method: 使用非相互作用电子密度作为结构描述符，通过方向分辨的两点空间相关性提取物理特征，并用主成分分析压缩。结合贝叶斯主动学习构建预测模型。
AI.result: 仅用10个训练样本，对Al-Nb-Ti-Zr合金的体弹性模量预测达到NMAE<2%。在完全未训练过的7组分Mo-Nb-Ta-Ti-V-W-Zr体系上实现零样本外推，仅需20个目标域样本即可达到NMAE<3%的高保真预测。
AI.conclusion: 非相互作用电子密度可作为高熵合金广阔成分空间的严格外推描述符，大幅降低数据获取成本，为加速合金发现提供高效计算框架。

title: Fractional Topological Phases, Flat Bands, and Robust Edge States on Finite Cyclic Graphs via Single-Coin Split-Step Quantum Walks
summary: We report the first realization of a fractional topological phase in a fully unitary, noninteracting discrete-time quantum walk implemented on finite cyclic graphs. Using a single-coin split-step cyclic quantum walk (SCSS-CQW), we uncover topological phenomena that are inaccessible within conventional cyclic quantum-walk dynamics. The protocol enables controlled engineering of quasienergy spectra, flat bands, and topological phase transitions through the step-dependency parameter and coin-rotation angle. We show that cyclic graphs with even and odd numbers of sites exhibit qualitatively different band structures, while rotational flat bands arise exclusively in $4n$-site cycles; a general analytic condition for their emergence is derived. The SCSS-CQW produces fractional winding numbers $\pm \frac{1}{2}$ (Zak phases $\pm \fracπ{2}$), in sharp contrast with the integer invariants of standard quantum walks. These fractional invariants lead to an unconventional bulk--boundary correspondence and support edge states beyond the usual integer topological classification. In the step-dependent protocol, transitions between distinct fractional winding sectors generate robust edge modes. Numerical simulations show that these states remain stable in the presence of both dynamic and static coin disorder as well as phase-preserving perturbations, while survival-probability analysis demonstrates their long-time persistence. Requiring only a constant number of detectors independent of the evolution time, the proposed scheme offers a minimal-resource and experimentally accessible platform for realizing fractional topology, flat bands, and protected edge states in small-scale synthetic quantum systems.

AI.tldr: 首次在完全幺正、非相互作用的离散时间量子行走中实现分数拓扑相，使用单硬币分步循环量子行走，在有限循环图上产生分数缠绕数±1/2和Zak相位±π/2。
AI.motivation: 传统循环量子行走动力学无法实现某些拓扑现象，需要开发新协议来探索分数拓扑相、平带和拓扑相变，为小规模合成量子系统提供实验可访问的平台。
AI.method: 采用单硬币分步循环量子行走协议，通过步依赖参数和硬币旋转角控制准能谱、平带和拓扑相变的工程化，分析偶数和奇数站点循环图的能带结构差异。
AI.result: 实现了分数缠绕数±1/2和Zak相位±π/2，发现了4n站点循环中特有的旋转平带，建立了分数拓扑不变量与边缘态之间的非常规体-边对应关系，边缘态在动态和静态硬币无序下保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为在小规模合成量子系统中实现分数拓扑、平带和保护边缘态提供了最小资源消耗和实验可访问的平台，超越了传统整数拓扑分类的限制。

title: Discovery of intertwined pair density and charge density wave orders in UTe2
comment: Main text: 17 pages, 4 figures; Supplementary Information: 13 pages, 12 figures
summary: The strongly correlated spin-triplet superconductor UTe2 hosts an unusual landscape of magnetic-field-sensitive charge density wave (CDW) phases, positioning it as a compelling system for studying intertwined electronic orders. A central challenge is determining whether the observed charge modulations arise from a triplet pair density wave (PDW) order and, if so, how the anisotropic magnetic field response of triplet superconductivity is manifested in the CDW response. Here, using a scanning tunneling microscope equipped with a vector magnetic field, we systematically investigate the evolution and interrelation of distinct CDW orders. Complementing the previously identified incommensurate CDW peaks (qi=1,2,3), we resolve an additional set of nondispersive modulations (pi=1,2,3 and h1,2) with distinct temperature and magnetic field dependencies. The pi CDW peaks vanish near Tc, while the qi peaks survive well above Tc but are progressively suppressed by magnetic field in an anisotropic manner. The critical fields of the qi peaks mirror the directional hierarchy of Hc2, which suggests a PDW is present above the bulk Tc. This is consistent with a Landau free-energy picture where PDWs with wavevectors pi form above the bulk Tc, leading to composite CDW orders with wavevector qi. Below Tc, the coupling of PDWs and uniform superconductivity leads to the pi CDWs. Together, these findings establish UTe2 as a rare platform where both the parent PDW and descendant orders are directly resolved, enabling access to both the fundamental and emergent manifestations of PDW physics.

AI.tldr: UTe2中发现三重态超导与电荷密度波交织，通过扫描隧道显微镜揭示PDW（对密度波）及其衍生的CDW序，磁场响应各向异性与超导临界场相关。
AI.motivation: 研究强关联三重态超导体UTe2中电荷密度波与超导序的相互交织关系，特别是探索观察到的电荷调制是否源于三重态对密度波序，以及三重态超导的各向异性磁场响应如何在CDW中体现。
AI.method: 使用配备矢量磁场的扫描隧道显微镜，系统研究不同CDW序的演化和相互关系。识别了非色散调制（pi=1,2,3和h1,2）以及之前已知的非公度CDW峰（qi=1,2,3），并分析它们的温度、磁场依赖关系。
AI.result: 发现pi CDW峰在Tc附近消失，而qi峰在Tc以上仍存在但被磁场各向异性抑制。qi峰的临界场与Hc2的方向层次一致，表明在体Tc以上存在PDW。这符合朗道自由能图像：pi波矢的PDW在体Tc以上形成，导致复合CDW序（qi波矢）；在Tc以下，PDW与均匀超导耦合产生pi CDW。
AI.conclusion: UTe2成为罕见平台，可直接解析母体PDW及其衍生序，为研究PDW物理的基本和涌现表现提供了独特机会，建立了PDW与CDW序之间的直接联系。

title: Bound Trions in Two-Dimensional Monolayers: A Review
summary: Trions -- Coulomb-bound three-particle excitations composed of two like-charge carriers and one oppositely charged carrier -- are central quasiparticles in two-dimensional semiconductors. Reduced dielectric screening and quantum confinement strongly enhance their binding energies, making them robust and experimentally accessible. This review surveys theoretical and experimental advances in trion physics, emphasizing rigorous few-body approaches and the role of dielectric environment, anisotropy, and external electric and magnetic fields. We analyze computational methods for describing trions in two-dimensional configuration spaces and discuss how reduced dimensionality modifies their structure and stability. Connections to many-body phenomena, including screening, Landau-level mixing, and exciton--polaron crossover, are also highlighted.

AI.tldr: 这篇综述论文系统回顾了二维半导体中三粒子激子（trion）的理论与实验进展，重点讨论了其物理特性、计算方法以及与多体现象的关联。
AI.motivation: 二维半导体中的三粒子激子（trion）因其独特的库仑束缚特性和增强的结合能而成为重要的准粒子。由于介电屏蔽减弱和量子限制效应，trion在二维系统中表现出更强的稳定性和实验可观测性，需要系统性地总结其物理特性和研究进展。
AI.method: 采用严格的少体理论方法，分析二维构型空间中的trion描述方法。考虑介电环境、各向异性以及外加电场和磁场的影响，并探讨降维如何改变trion的结构和稳定性。
AI.result: 综述了trion物理的理论和实验进展，建立了计算trion在二维系统中的有效方法，阐明了降维对trion特性的影响，并揭示了trion与多体现象（如屏蔽、朗道能级混合、激子-极化子交叉）之间的重要联系。
AI.conclusion: 二维半导体中的trion是理解低维量子系统的重要模型体系，其研究不仅揭示了少体物理的基本特性，还为探索多体现象和量子调控提供了重要平台。未来的研究需要进一步整合理论计算与实验观测，深化对trion物理的理解。

title: Optimizing quantum transport in multi-barrier graphene systems using differential evolution
summary: Potential and mass barriers in graphene introduce electron scattering, modulating transmission probabilities. Complex multi-barrier setups allow electron transmission to be controlled with high precision, but have a huge design space of possible barrier geometries. This work presents a framework to optimize electronic transport in such systems using differential evolution algorithms. First, transfer matrix methods are employed to efficiently compute quantum transport through multi-barrier structures, before optimization is applied to find barrier configurations whose transmission profiles closely match a predefined target profile. To address the trade-off between the accuracy and complexity of resulting barrier configurations, regularization techniques are incorporated into the optimization process. Our approach demonstrates the potential for highly tunable electronic transport in graphene-based systems by exploiting evolution-inspired optimization techniques.

AI.tldr: 使用差分进化算法优化石墨烯多势垒结构的电子传输，通过正则化平衡精度与复杂度
AI.motivation: 石墨烯中的势垒和质量势垒会引入电子散射，调节传输概率。复杂的多势垒结构可以高精度控制电子传输，但存在巨大的设计空间，需要有效方法来优化势垒配置。
AI.method: 采用差分进化算法框架，首先使用传递矩阵方法高效计算多势垒结构的量子传输，然后优化势垒配置使其传输特性与预设目标曲线匹配。通过正则化技术平衡结果精度与复杂度。
AI.result: 该方法展示了利用进化启发优化技术在石墨烯基系统中实现高度可调谐电子传输的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架能够有效优化石墨烯多势垒结构的电子传输特性，通过正则化平衡精度与复杂度，为石墨烯基电子器件设计提供了有力工具。

title: Exotic Cooperative Quantum Optics of Moire Exciton Superlattices
summary: The unique properties of two-dimensional moire systems have been widely studied from many perspectives. However, relatively little work has explored how the real space structure of the moire systems can directly engender novel properties and functionalities. In this work, we exploit the feature that moire excitons naturally form an ordered superlattice with a lattice constant comparable to the wavelength of the resonant light, which enables intriguing cooperative optical responses. Particularly, we show that the collective moire exciton states can have either strongly enhanced (superradiant) or suppressed (subradiant) radiative decay rate, depending on their in-plane wavevector. These super- and subradiant states can be efficiently switched by a gate-induced electric field gradient. Moreover, the cooperative transmittance $T$ of the nanometer-thick moire system can be switched from $T \approx 0$ (opaque) to $T \approx 1$ (transparent) with less than $2~\%$ heterostrain or a $1^{\circ}$ adjustment in the twist angle $θ$. These features are robust against non-radiative losses and inhomogeneity, making the moire system a highly versatile platform for cooperative quantum optics with potential applications in e.g., single photon storage and switching.

AI.tldr: 二维莫尔系统中莫尔激子形成有序超晶格，其晶格常数与共振光波长相当，可实现集体光学响应，包括超辐射和亚辐射态的电控切换，以及透射率从0到1的可调谐性。
AI.motivation: 虽然二维莫尔系统的独特性质已从多角度研究，但较少探索其真实空间结构如何直接产生新性质和功能。本文旨在利用莫尔激子自然形成的有序超晶格，实现新颖的集体光学响应。
AI.method: 利用莫尔激子形成晶格常数与共振光波长相当的有序超晶格特性，研究其集体光学响应。通过栅极诱导的电场梯度切换超辐射和亚辐射态，并通过异质应变或扭转角调整调控透射率。
AI.result: 集体莫尔激子态可具有强烈增强（超辐射）或抑制（亚辐射）的辐射衰减率，取决于其面内波矢。这些态可通过栅极电场梯度高效切换。纳米厚莫尔系统的透射率可从T≈0（不透明）切换到T≈1（透明），仅需小于2%的异质应变或1°的扭转角调整。
AI.conclusion: 这些特性对非辐射损耗和不均匀性具有鲁棒性，使莫尔系统成为合作量子光学的高度通用平台，在单光子存储和开关等应用中具有潜力。

title: Magnetic and electrical transport properties of the single-crystalline half-Heusler antiferromagnet DyNiSb
summary: High-quality single crystals of the half-Heusler compound DyNiSb were investigated for their low temperature thermodynamic and magnetotransport properties. Magnetic susceptibility, heat capacity, and electrical resistivity measurements revealed two distinct magnetic phase transitions at TN1 = 7.3 K and TN2 = 3.4 K, contrasting with previous reports on polycrystalline samples, which identified only a single transition near TN2 . Moreover, the studied samples were found to exhibit Metal like conductivity, at odds with a semiconducting behavior reported for the polycrystals. Magnetoresistance measurements performed in both transverse and longitudinal configurations revealed in small magnetic fields a weak antilocalization effect that diminishes with increasing temperature, giving way to a positive, monotonic magnetoresistance at high temperatures. Angular-dependent resistivity studies showed a crossover from fourfold to twofold symmetry with increasing magnetic-field strength, suggesting a field-induced reconstruction of the Fermi surface. Our findings highlight a complex magnetic and electrical transport behavior in DyNiSb, highly sensitive to structural disorder and easily tunable by external magnetic field.

AI.tldr: DyNiSb单晶在低温下表现出复杂的磁性和电输运行为，发现两个磁相变（7.3K和3.4K），与多晶样品仅观察到一个转变不同，且呈现金属性导电而非半导体行为。
AI.motivation: 研究DyNiSb半Heusler化合物的低温热力学和磁输运性质，澄清先前多晶样品研究中存在的矛盾结果，探索结构无序和外部磁场对材料性质的影响。
AI.method: 使用高质量单晶样品，通过磁化率、热容、电阻率测量研究低温性质，进行横向和纵向磁阻测量，分析温度依赖性和磁场强度依赖性。
AI.result: 发现两个磁相变（TN1=7.3K，TN2=3.4K），样品呈现金属性导电，小磁场下观察到弱反局域化效应，高磁场下出现正单调磁阻，角依赖电阻显示从四重对称到二重对称的转变。
AI.conclusion: DyNiSb表现出复杂的磁性和电输运行为，对结构无序高度敏感，且可通过外部磁场调控，费米面可能发生磁场诱导重构。

title: Emergent spin accumulation in non-Hermitian altermagnets
summary: The recent interest in non-Hermitian (NH) systems has significantly broadened their application across condensed matter physics, offering a unique framework to explore out-of-equilibrium phenomena. Simultaneously, altermagnets have emerged as a distinct magnetic class, characterized by unconventional spin-split bands protected by crystal symmetries. In this work, we investigate the interplay between non-Hermitian dynamics and spin transport in these materials, focusing on the Edelstein effect. We demonstrate that the introduction of non-Hermiticity in $d$-wave altermagnets and $p$-wave unconventional magnets opens novel susceptibility components that are inaccessible in Hermitian counterparts. Our analysis reveals that these susceptibility channels are highly sensitive to the underlying symmetry of the order parameter. Crucially, our results show that the non-conservative nature of the system leads to the selective gain and loss of specific spin components, a phenomenon that can be tuned by the interplay between dissipation and the altermagnetic order. These components exhibit a distinct gain/loss profile that depends strictly on the Néel vector orientation, providing a new route for manipulating spin degrees of freedom through controlled non-conservative processes in emerging magnetic materials

AI.tldr: 研究非厄米动力学与反铁磁材料中自旋输运的相互作用，揭示非厄米性引入新的可调自旋响应通道
AI.motivation: 非厄米系统为探索非平衡现象提供了独特框架，而反铁磁体作为具有非常规自旋分裂能带的新磁类材料，研究两者相互作用可揭示新的自旋输运机制
AI.method: 研究d波反铁磁体和p波非常规磁体中的非厄米动力学，重点关注Edelstein效应，分析非厄米性引入的新磁化率分量及其对序参数对称性的敏感性
AI.result: 非厄米性在反铁磁体中开启了厄米对应物无法获得的新磁化率分量，这些通道对序参数对称性高度敏感，系统的非保守性质导致特定自旋分量的选择性增益和损耗
AI.conclusion: 非厄米性与反铁磁序的相互作用为通过可控非保守过程操纵自旋自由度提供了新途径，增益/损耗特性严格依赖于Néel矢量方向

title: Anomalous magnetotransport in the single-crystalline half-Heusler antiferromagnet ErPdSb
summary: We report the thermodynamic and magnetotransport properties of the half-Heusler antimonide ErPdSb, studied on single-crystalline samples in wide ranges of temperature and magnetic fields. The compound was found to order antiferromagnetically at 1.2 K. In the paramagnetic state, it shows semimetallic behavior with a broad hump in the temperature-dependent electrical resistivity around 70 K. The results of ab initio calculations of the electronic structure of ErPdSb indicated a bulk insulating nature. In small magnetic fields the magnetoresistance is driven by a weak antilocalization effect, while in strong fields it is negative and describable by the deGennes-Friedel formalism. The Hall effect data indicated that holes are the dominant charge carriers. At 2 K, the Hall conductivity exhibits a sizable anomalous contribution, which is obscured by multiband effects at higher temperatures. The angular magnetoresistance shows unusual features as functions of magnetic field and temperature, pointing to a possible field-induced reconstruction of the Fermi surface.

AI.tldr: ErPdSb半赫斯勒锑化物在1.2K以下呈现反铁磁有序，在顺磁态表现为半金属行为，70K附近电阻率出现宽峰。小磁场下磁电阻由弱反局域化效应主导，强磁场下为负值且可用deGennes-Friedel形式描述。霍尔效应显示空穴为主要载流子，2K时霍尔电导存在显著反常贡献。
AI.motivation: 研究ErPdSb半赫斯勒化合物的热力学和磁输运性质，探索其在宽温区和磁场范围内的电子结构、磁有序行为以及可能的费米面重构现象。
AI.method: 使用单晶样品在宽温区和磁场范围内进行热力学和磁输运测量，结合第一性原理计算电子结构，分析磁电阻、霍尔效应和角磁电阻等输运特性。
AI.result: ErPdSb在1.2K发生反铁磁有序转变；顺磁态呈半金属行为，70K附近电阻率出现宽峰；第一性原理计算显示体绝缘特性；小磁场下弱反局域化效应主导磁电阻，强磁场下为负磁电阻；霍尔效应表明空穴为主要载流子，2K时存在显著反常霍尔贡献；角磁电阻异常特征暗示可能的磁场诱导费米面重构。
AI.conclusion: ErPdSb表现出复杂的电子和磁学性质，包括低温反铁磁有序、半金属输运行为、弱反局域化效应和可能的磁场诱导费米面重构，这些特性使其成为研究拓扑材料和关联电子系统的有趣平台。

title: DeepConf: Machine Learning Conformer Reconstruction of Biomolecules from Scanning Tunneling Microscopy Images
summary: Improving the detailed understanding of the underlying properties and functions of biomolecules has recently attracted growing interest, enabled by the possibility of real-space imaging of single, intact macromolecules using Scanning Tunneling Microscopy (STM) in combination with electrospray ion beam deposition and soft landing. This combination provides key insights into biomolecular behavior, but it also imposes stringent requirements on rapid and reliable data analysis. A major limiting factor for applying machine learning to STM images is often the scarcity of training data, caused by the long acquisition times required for both experimental imaging and high-accuracy simulations. Here, we propose a framework for the rapid generation of three-dimensional structures of glycans, peptides, and glycopeptides and their corresponding STM-like image simulations, based on state-of-the-art, machine-learning-accelerated Density Functional Theory (DFT). We generate datasets for the polypeptide bradykinin and for a representative glycan molecule, and we train a conformer estimation model to predict a molecule's three-dimensional structure from an STM image. On synthetic data, our approach achieves high accuracy, with median atomic deviations below $2\,Å$ for peptides and below $4\,Å$ for glycans. Application to experimental data predominantly yields a precise, reliable, and visually convincing determination of the local positions of molecular subunits. The application to experimental data represents an important milestone towards a fully automated structural search pipeline for complex, biologically relevant systems imaged with STM.

AI.tldr: 提出一个结合机器学习加速DFT的框架，用于快速生成糖类、肽类和糖肽的3D结构及STM图像模拟，训练模型从STM图像预测分子构象，在合成数据上达到高精度，并成功应用于实验数据。
AI.motivation: 扫描隧道显微镜（STM）结合电喷雾离子束沉积技术能够实现生物大分子的实空间成像，但数据分析面临训练数据稀缺的挑战，因为实验成像和高精度模拟都需要很长时间。
AI.method: 提出一个基于机器学习加速密度泛函理论（DFT）的框架，快速生成糖类、肽类和糖肽的三维结构及其对应的STM图像模拟。使用这些数据训练构象估计模型，从STM图像预测分子的三维结构。
AI.result: 在合成数据上，方法达到高精度：肽类的原子位置中位数偏差低于2Å，糖类低于4Å。应用于实验数据时，能够精确、可靠地确定分子亚基的局部位置，结果视觉上令人信服。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂生物系统的STM图像实现全自动结构搜索管道迈出了重要一步，展示了机器学习加速模拟在生物分子STM成像分析中的潜力。

title: Bulk OsO2 Single Crystals: Superior Catalysts for Water Oxidation
comment: 36 pages,18 figures, published online at Advanced Functional Materials
summary: Although rutile RuO2 has been a well-known and almost the best oxygen evolution reaction (OER) catalyst, the OER properties for the similar rutile oxide OsO2 with the same group element with Ru have been unknown, mainly due to long-standing synthesis difficulties. In this work, we report the successful synthesis of high-quality OsO2 single crystals, and the ground micrometer-size single crystals are chemically stable in alkaline solutions and exhibit robust OER performance. In sharp contrast, OsO2 nanopowder reacts quickly with KOH solutions and cannot work for OER. Compared with commercial RuO2 nanopowder, the OsO2 single crystals show comparable catalytic current densities, remarkably lower overpotentials at high current densities and better stability. These findings question the universal applicability of nanoscaling and highlight crystal integrity as a key descriptor for achieving stable and efficient OER electrocatalysis.

AI.tldr: 成功合成高质量OsO2单晶，发现其在碱性溶液中化学稳定且具有优异OER性能，而纳米粉末则不稳定，挑战了纳米化策略的普适性
AI.motivation: 尽管RuO2是已知的最佳OER催化剂之一，但同族元素Os的类似氧化物OsO2的OER性能一直未知，主要由于合成困难
AI.method: 成功合成高质量OsO2单晶体，将其研磨成微米级单晶颗粒，在碱性溶液中测试OER性能，并与纳米粉末和商业RuO2纳米粉末进行对比
AI.result: OsO2单晶在碱性溶液中化学稳定且表现出优异的OER性能，催化电流密度与商业RuO2相当，在高电流密度下具有更低的过电位和更好的稳定性；而OsO2纳米粉末则快速与KOH反应且无法用于OER
AI.conclusion: 研究结果质疑了纳米化策略的普适适用性，强调晶体完整性是实现稳定高效OER电催化的关键描述符

title: Terahertz-nanoscale visualization of the microscopic spin-charge architecture of colossal magnetoresistive switching
summary: Resolving sub-10 nm spin switching and the associated terahertz (THz) electrodynamics during the colossal magnetoresistance (CMR) transition is a definitive frontier in reaching the fundamental spatial, temporal, and energy-dissipation limits of spin-based microelectronics and quantum logic architectures. Yet, the requirement of simultaneous control of high magnetic field, cryogenic environment, and nanometer-scale resolution has remained an elusive benchmark for terahertz nanoscopy, leaving the obscured nano-scale high-frequency dynamics of these transitions largely unexplored. Here, we overcome these limitations by utilizing a custom-built cryogenic magneto-THz scattering-type scanning near-field optical microscopy (cm-THz-sSNOM) platform to resolve the nanoscale, THz spectroscopic evolution of the magnetic field-driven CMR transition in a manganite single crystal $\text{Pr}_{2/3}\text{Ca}_{1/3}\text{MnO}_{3}$. Our measurements provide a real-space visualization of the local THz conductivity, capturing the moment that magnetic-field-induced spin switching triggers the phase transition from an antiferromagnetic insulator to a ferromagnetic metal. THz nano-imaging, together with an ellipsoidal near-field model, reveals a multi-scale transition initiated by 1-2 nm isolated spin-flip sites at low magnetic fields, which coalesce into $\sim$15~nm conducting regions as the threshold field is approached. These results provide an in situ, previously inaccessible THz real-space view of CMR switching, establishing a general analysis framework for mapping spin-charge-lattice-orbit-coupled dynamics at spatial scales that transcend the nominal sSNOM resolution.

AI.tldr: 研究人员开发了低温磁太赫兹散射型扫描近场光学显微镜平台，首次在纳米尺度上观测到锰氧化物中巨磁阻转变的太赫兹电动力学过程，揭示了自旋翻转从1-2纳米孤立位点开始，最终形成约15纳米导电区域的相变机制。
AI.motivation: 理解巨磁阻转变过程中亚10纳米自旋开关及其相关的太赫兹电动力学，对于探索自旋基微电子和量子逻辑架构的基本空间、时间和能量耗散极限至关重要。然而，同时控制高磁场、低温环境和纳米级分辨率的要求一直是太赫兹纳米技术的难题，导致这些转变的纳米尺度高频动力学特性长期未被探索。
AI.method: 研究人员构建了定制化的低温磁太赫兹散射型扫描近场光学显微镜平台，用于研究Pr2/3Ca1/3MnO3锰氧化物单晶中磁场驱动的巨磁阻转变。通过太赫兹纳米成像结合椭球近场模型，在纳米尺度上解析了局部太赫兹电导率的演化。
AI.result: 测量实现了局部太赫兹电导率的实空间可视化，捕捉到磁场诱导的自旋开关触发从反铁磁绝缘体到铁磁金属相变的瞬间。太赫兹纳米成像显示，相变起始于低磁场下的1-2纳米孤立自旋翻转位点，随着接近阈值磁场，这些位点聚集成约15纳米的导电区域。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次提供了巨磁阻开关过程中以前无法获得的太赫兹实空间视图，建立了一个通用分析框架，用于在超越传统近场光学显微镜分辨率的空间尺度上映射自旋-电荷-晶格-轨道耦合动力学。

title: Electric-Polarization Probe of the Magnon Orbital Moment Current in Altermagnet
comment: 13 pages and 5 figures. We invite comments and feedback
summary: Efficient transport of spin and orbital moments, and their electrical detection, are among the main challenges in spintronics and orbitronics. In magnetic insulators, these currents are mediated by magnons. In addition to carrying spin and orbital moment, the orbital motion of a magnon combined with its magnetic moment, generates an effective electric dipole moment. Here, we develop a theoretical framework for Seebeck- and Nernst-type transport of the magnon orbital moment (MOM) and its associated electric dipole moment (EDM). We identify a Drude-like scattering contribution and an intrinsic component governed by the generalized Berry curvatures of magnon bands. We show that a measurable transverse voltage generated by the EDM current provides a direct electrical detection scheme for magnon orbital transport. Applying our theory to an hexagonal altermagnet, we obtain an experimentally accessible voltage of approximately $0.4~μ$V. Our results establish a concrete electrical probe of magnon orbital transport and highlight magnons as potential low-dissipation information carriers for orbitronics.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个理论框架，用于研究磁振子轨道矩及其相关电偶极矩的塞贝克型和能斯特型输运，并展示了通过电偶极矩电流产生的横向电压可以直接电学检测磁振子轨道输运。
AI.motivation: 自旋和轨道矩的高效输运及其电学检测是自旋电子学和轨道电子学的主要挑战。在磁性绝缘体中，这些电流由磁振子介导。磁振子的轨道运动与其磁矩结合会产生有效的电偶极矩，这为轨道输运提供了新的检测途径。
AI.method: 开发了一个理论框架来分析磁振子轨道矩及其电偶极矩的输运。识别了类德鲁德散射贡献和由磁振子带广义贝里曲率控制的本征分量。将该理论应用于六角形交变磁体进行计算。
AI.result: 理论预测了通过电偶极矩电流产生的可测量横向电压，可直接电学检测磁振子轨道输运。在六角形交变磁体中获得了约0.4μV的实验可及电压。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了磁振子轨道输运的具体电学探测方法，并突显了磁振子作为轨道电子学中潜在低耗散信息载体的重要性。

title: Crystal electric field excitations and spin dynamics in a spin-orbit coupled distorted honeycomb magnet BiErGeO$_5$
summary: The magnetic properties and crystal electric field (CEF) scheme of BiErGeO$_5$ are investigated via magnetization, heat capacity, muon spin relaxation (muSR), and inelastic neutron scattering (INS) experiments on a polycrystalline sample. The Er$^{3+}$ ions form a quasi-two-dimensional distorted honeycomb network with a Kramers doublet ground state. Magnetic susceptibility and heat capacity reveal short-range antiferromagnetic correlations, manifested as a broad maximum around 1.4 K. Heat-capacity data further confirm the onset of a magnetic long-range order at $T_ N = 0.4$ K. The INS spectra exhibit eight CEF excitations and the CEF analysis yields the $g$-factor anisotropy with $g_{xy}/g_{z} = 1.38$ and exchange anisotropy with $J_{xy} = 2.96$ K and $J_{z} = 1.56$ K. The experimental temperature and field dependent magnetization and heat capacity are also reproduced by the simulation using CEF energy scheme. Zero-field muSR measurements down to 30 mK, do not exhibit coherent oscillations or a static 1/3 tail. The spectra are well described by two exponential relaxation components, indicating two magnetically inequivalent muon environments. The relaxation rates display a nearly temperature-independent plateau below $T_{\rm N}$ and follow an Orbach-type activated behavior at higher temperatures involving excited CEF levels, consistent with the INS results. Longitudinal-field $μ$SR measurements reveal only weak decoupling up to 1.5 T, indicating persistent slow spin fluctuations below $T_{\rm N}$.

AI.tldr: 通过磁化、比热、μSR和中子散射实验研究了BiErGeO5的磁性和晶体电场，发现Er3+离子形成准二维扭曲蜂窝网络，具有Kramers双重态基态，在TN=0.4K发生长程磁有序，但μSR显示低于TN仍存在缓慢自旋涨落。
AI.motivation: 研究BiErGeO5中Er3+离子的磁性质和晶体电场方案，特别是准二维扭曲蜂窝网络中的磁有序和自旋动力学行为。
AI.method: 使用多晶样品进行磁化率、比热、μ子自旋弛豫(μSR)和非弹性中子散射(INS)实验，结合晶体电场分析模拟磁化率和比热数据。
AI.result: 发现短程反铁磁关联(1.4K宽峰)和长程磁有序(TN=0.4K)，INS显示8个CEF激发，得到g因子各向异性gxy/gz=1.38和交换各向异性Jxy=2.96K、Jz=1.56K。μSR显示两个μ子环境，弛豫率在TN以下呈平台，表明存在持续缓慢自旋涨落。
AI.conclusion: BiErGeO5中Er3+离子形成准二维扭曲蜂窝网络，具有Kramers双重态基态和各向异性交换相互作用，在TN=0.4K发生长程磁有序，但μSR揭示即使在有序态下仍存在缓慢自旋动力学行为。

title: Magnetic phase diagram and spin Hamiltonian of antiferromagnet Cs$_2$CoI$_4$
summary: We report comprehensive thermodynamic and neutron scattering measurements on the $S$ = 3/2 antiferromagnet Cs$_2$CoI$_4$, a member of the thoroughly studied family of frustrated magnets Cs$_2MX_4$ ($M$ = Cu, Co, Ru, $X$ = Br, Cl, I, O). Unlike previously studied members, Cs$_2$CoI$_4$ undergoes a structural phase transition, for which we determine the low-temperature crystallographic structure. The resulting symmetry reduction strongly affects both the magnetic exchange interactions and single-ion anisotropy. Despite the large parameter space, we propose a minimal magnetic Hamiltonian that reasonably captures the observed excitation spectrum, analyzed using extended SU(4) linear spin-wave theory.

AI.tldr: Cs₂CoI₄作为Cs₂MX₄家族新成员，经历结构相变导致对称性降低，显著影响磁交换相互作用和单离子各向异性，研究者提出了最小磁哈密顿量并用扩展SU(4)线性自旋波理论解释激发谱。
AI.motivation: 研究Cs₂CoI₄这一Cs₂MX₄家族新成员的特殊性质，特别是其结构相变如何影响磁相互作用，填补该家族中尚未研究的成员空白。
AI.method: 综合热力学和中子散射测量，确定低温晶体结构，提出最小磁哈密顿量，并使用扩展SU(4)线性自旋波理论分析激发谱。
AI.result: 确定了Cs₂CoI₄的低温晶体结构，发现结构相变导致对称性降低，显著影响磁交换相互作用和单离子各向异性，提出的最小磁哈密顿量能合理描述观测到的激发谱。
AI.conclusion: Cs₂CoI₄的结构相变是其磁性质的关键决定因素，扩展SU(4)线性自旋波理论能有效描述这一复杂系统的激发行为，为理解Cs₂MX₄家族材料的磁性质提供了新视角。

title: Four-state discrimination for a pair of spin qubits via gate reflectometry
comment: 9 pages main text + 8 pages appendix and bibliography
summary: Single-electron spin qubits defined in quantum dots are used as building blocks of a semiconductor-based quantum computer. Readout in a scaled-up version of such a quantum computer is expected to rely on the Pauli Spin Blockade (PSB) mechanism. A desired functionality of PSB readout is that it reveals two bits of information on the two spin qubits that are involved in the process, such that the four computational basis states can be discriminated. In this work, we propose and quantitatively analyze an experimental procedure, based on gate reflectometry, which enables this four-state discrimination in a single measurement. We provide an intuitive recipe to maximize the contrast between the quantum capacitances of the four basis states. Focusing on silicon double quantum dots equipped with a micromagnet, we quantify how amplifier noise and phonon-mediated relaxation influence readout fidelity. Our results highlight a realistic opportunity to mitigate the overhead of readout ancilla qubits in a spin-based quantum computer.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于门反射测量技术的实验方案，可在单次测量中实现硅双量子点中两个自旋量子比特四种计算基态的区分，无需读取辅助量子比特。
AI.motivation: 在基于量子点的半导体量子计算机中，读取操作通常依赖泡利自旋阻塞机制。理想的读取应能区分两个自旋量子比特的四种计算基态，但目前缺乏有效的单次测量方案。
AI.method: 提出基于门反射测量技术的实验方案，通过优化量子电容对比度最大化四种基态之间的区分度。针对配备微磁体的硅双量子点系统，定量分析放大器噪声和声子介导的弛豫对读取保真度的影响。
AI.result: 该方案能够在单次测量中实现四种计算基态的可靠区分，为减少自旋量子计算机中读取辅助量子比特的开销提供了现实可行的机会。
AI.conclusion: 基于门反射测量的四态区分方案为硅量子点自旋量子比特的高效读取提供了实用方法，有望降低量子计算机的读取开销。

title: Impacts of Fermi Level Pinning at Hole-Selective Contacts in CdSeTe/CdTe Solar Cells
summary: P-type doped CdTe free surfaces Schottky contacts, and even interfaces with isostructural p-ZnTe frequently exhibit downward band bending and moderate to high recombination velocities. Fermi level pinning by donor-like states can explain these band diagram features, as well as device response characteristics such as 1st quadrant rollover in current-voltage (JV) versus temperature (JVT). Parasitic downward band bending also produces voltage-dependent photocurrent collection, producing fill factor (FF) efficiency losses, JV dark/light non-superposition (or JV take-off), and irregularities in Jsc-Voc and Suns-Voc measurements. Herein, we develop a device physics model of state-of-the-art CdSeTe/CdTe solar cells consistent with known characterization of materials and devices, including the optical, thermalization, and trapping effects of band tail states and isolated defects. We use this model to demonstrate that Fermi-level pinning at the p-ZnTe/p-CdSeTe hole contact by donor-like defects reproduces the aforementioned observables, and conclude that (for contemporary few-um absorber thicknesses and low mobilities) it primarily affects FF rather than Voc. We investigate the performance gains possible from hypothetical passivated, hole-selective layers at the ZnTe/CdTe interface, which eliminate the downwards band bending caused by donor-like defects. For thinner devices and larger minority carrier diffusion lengths, these strategies will become more important for continued efficiency improvements.

AI.tldr: CdTe太阳能电池中p-ZnTe/p-CdSeTe界面处的费米能级钉扎导致向下能带弯曲，主要影响填充因子而非开路电压，通过界面钝化可改善性能。
AI.motivation: 研究CdTe太阳能电池中p型掺杂表面、肖特基接触和p-ZnTe界面普遍存在的向下能带弯曲问题，这种能带弯曲由施主态引起的费米能级钉扎导致，造成器件性能损失。
AI.method: 开发了CdSeTe/CdTe太阳能电池的器件物理模型，考虑了带尾态和孤立缺陷的光学、热化和俘获效应，模拟了p-ZnTe/p-CdSeTe界面处施主缺陷引起的费米能级钉扎效应。
AI.result: 模型成功复现了实验观测现象：电流-电压特性的一象限滚降、电压依赖性光电流收集、填充因子损失、暗/光特性非叠加等，发现对于当前几微米厚的吸收层和低迁移率情况，主要影响填充因子而非开路电压。
AI.conclusion: p-ZnTe/p-CdSeTe界面处的施主缺陷导致费米能级钉扎和向下能带弯曲，是器件性能损失的主要原因。通过界面钝化和空穴选择性层可消除这种能带弯曲，对于更薄器件和更大扩散长度的情况，这种策略对效率提升尤为重要。

title: Microscopic theory of flexo Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya-type interaction
summary: We study interaction between two magnetic impurities mediated by itinerant electrons on the surface of curved magnets based on perturbation theory. We show that Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya type interaction can arise from inhomogeneous spin texture by bending, without any spin-orbit coupling. Analytical expressions of the Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya type interaction are obtained. We demonstrate this effect in a one-dimensional ring model.

AI.tldr: 弯曲磁体表面上的两个磁性杂质通过巡游电子产生相互作用，即使没有自旋轨道耦合，弯曲导致的非均匀自旋织构也能产生Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya型相互作用。
AI.motivation: 研究弯曲磁体表面上磁性杂质之间的相互作用，探索在没有自旋轨道耦合的情况下，仅通过几何弯曲就能产生Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya型相互作用的可能性。
AI.method: 基于微扰理论研究巡游电子介导的两个磁性杂质相互作用，推导Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya型相互作用的解析表达式，并用一维环模型进行验证。
AI.result: 证明了仅通过弯曲产生的非均匀自旋织构就能诱导出Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya型相互作用，获得了该相互作用的解析表达式，并在一维环模型中成功演示了这一效应。
AI.conclusion: 弯曲磁体的几何结构本身就能产生Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya型相互作用，无需自旋轨道耦合，这为调控磁性相互作用提供了新的物理机制。

title: Designing Extremely Low-Power Topological Transistors with 1T'-MoS2 and HZO for Cryogenic Applications
summary: Large-scale quantum computing requires cryogenic electronic controllers such as control/readout circuit and routing circuit. However, current technologies face high power dissipation problems, hindering large-scale qubit integration. Here, we theoretically propose extremely low-power cryogenic topological transistors, i.e., negative-capacitance topological insulator field-effect transistors (NC-TIFETs). By combining a gate-field-induced two-dimensional 1T'-Molybdenum Disulfide (MoS$_2$) topological channel with a hafnium-zirconium oxide (HZO) ferroelectric gate insulator, NC-TIFETs exhibit an extremely steep-slope transfer curve and ultra-high transconductance at low drain voltage ($V_{\mathrm{D}}$). Therefore, NC-TIFETs are the compelling candidate for minimizing power dissipation in the cryogenic electronic interfaces essential for large-scale quantum computing systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于低温量子计算控制器的极低功耗拓扑晶体管（NC-TIFET），结合二维拓扑绝缘体通道和铁电栅介质，实现陡峭的转移特性和高跨导。
AI.motivation: 大规模量子计算需要低温电子控制器，但现有技术面临高功耗问题，阻碍了大规模量子比特集成。需要开发极低功耗的低温晶体管解决方案。
AI.method: 理论提出负电容拓扑绝缘体场效应晶体管（NC-TIFET），结合栅场诱导的二维1T'-MoS2拓扑通道和HZO铁电栅介质，在低漏极电压下实现陡峭的转移曲线和高跨导。
AI.result: NC-TIFET表现出极陡峭的斜率转移特性和超高跨导，是减少大规模量子计算系统低温电子接口功耗的理想候选方案。
AI.conclusion: NC-TIFET为解决大规模量子计算中低温电子控制器的功耗问题提供了有前景的技术路径，有望推动量子计算系统的大规模集成。

title: High Thermal Conductivity in Back-End-of-Line Compatible AlN Thin Films
summary: With thermal issues becoming a major challenge to the development of integrated circuits (ICs), high-thermal-conductivity (high-TC) materials are gaining interest from both the industry and academia, especially for high-density back-end-of-line (BEOL) structures. Aluminum nitride (AlN) is an insulating material with high TC, suitable for thermal management in electronic devices. Furthermore, polycrystalline AlN thin films can be deposited at BEOL-compatible low temperatures (lower than 400 C) while retaining relatively high TC, rendering AlN a promising candidate for BEOL heat dissipation. Still, AlN deposition should aim at achieving high TC on a variety of substrates used in IC processes. In this work, we obtained 600- and 1200-nm BEOL-compatible AlN thin film samples on Si, SiO, SiN, and Al2O3 substrates for structural and thermal characterizations. Specifically, time-domain thermoreflectance (TDTR) measurements revealed consistently high TC (higher than 45 W m-1 K-1) on different substrates. Moreover, finite element analysis (FEA) simulations of AlN capped on top of an indium-tin-oxide (ITO) transistor showed a reduction of up to 44% in peak device temperature. Our work provided experimental and calculational evidence for the practicality of leveraging AlN as a high-TC, BEOL-compatible heat spreader material.

AI.tldr: 该研究证明了氮化铝(AlN)薄膜可作为后端工艺兼容的高导热散热材料，在不同衬底上均能保持高于45 W/m·K的热导率，并能降低晶体管峰值温度达44%。
AI.motivation: 随着集成电路热管理问题日益严峻，需要寻找后端工艺兼容的高导热材料。氮化铝具有高热导率且能在低温（<400°C）下沉积，是理想的后端散热材料候选，但需要验证其在各种衬底上的实际性能。
AI.method: 在Si、SiO、SiN和Al2O3衬底上制备600nm和1200nm的BEOL兼容AlN薄膜样品，使用时域热反射法测量热导率，并通过有限元分析模拟AlN覆盖ITO晶体管的热管理效果。
AI.result: 在不同衬底上均测得高于45 W/m·K的高热导率，有限元分析显示AlN覆盖可使ITO晶体管的峰值温度降低高达44%，证明了AlN作为后端散热材料的有效性。
AI.conclusion: AlN薄膜是实用且高效的后端工艺兼容散热材料，能在不同衬底上保持高热导率，显著降低器件温度，为集成电路热管理提供了实验和计算依据。

title: Band modulations and topological transitions in a one-dimensional periodic bead-on-string chain
summary: We study band modulations and topological transitions in a one-dimensional periodic bead-on-string chain. Using an exact transfer-matrix formulation of the wave equation with periodically modulated mass density, combined with numerical spectral searches and tabletop experiments, we characterize band gaps and localized midgap states. We interpret these states by mapping the system to the Su-Schrieffer-Heeger (SSH) model and its low-energy (1+1)-dimensional Dirac theory. This framework reveals that the robust states are topological solitons bound to boundaries or engineered domain walls in the Dirac mass. Through this mapping, we provide an intuitive account of how band structure controls topological phase changes in mechanically realizable lattices.

AI.tldr: 研究一维周期性串珠链中的能带调制和拓扑相变，通过精确传递矩阵方法、数值模拟和实验，揭示了拓扑孤子态与SSH模型和狄拉克理论的映射关系。
AI.motivation: 研究机械可实现晶格中的能带结构和拓扑相变，探索如何通过周期性质量密度调制控制拓扑性质，为机械系统中的拓扑现象提供直观理解。
AI.method: 采用精确的传递矩阵方法描述周期性质量密度调制的波动方程，结合数值谱搜索和桌面实验，将系统映射到SSH模型及其低能(1+1)维狄拉克理论。
AI.result: 表征了能带间隙和局域化中间带隙态，揭示了这些态是束缚在边界或工程化狄拉克质量畴壁上的拓扑孤子，建立了能带结构控制拓扑相变的直观框架。
AI.conclusion: 通过将机械系统映射到SSH模型和狄拉克理论，为机械可实现晶格中的拓扑相变提供了直观解释，展示了能带结构如何控制拓扑性质的变化。

title: Orbital-Selective Engineering of Strain-Tunable Chern Insulators in Momentum Space
summary: Unlike conventional approaches where topological order is statically fixed post-synthesis, we demonstrate that a single external knob-strain-can independently modulate topological order and functional responses in the Tc-adsorbed penta-hexa silicene (Tc_PH-Si) monolayer, with both properties governed by a single microscopic mechanism: momentum-space orbital-selective engineering of Tc-dxz_Si-px hybridization. Combining first-principles calculations and tight-binding models, we show that biaxial strain drives a complete topological pathway: C=1 (0) to C=0 (-2) to C = -1 (-3 to -4) to C = 0 metallic state (-6). This is exemplified by two pivotal states: a topologically critical point yet functionally optimal state at -2 strain (C=0) hosting a direct bandgap (0.17 eV) and d11 = 8.34 pm_V, and a topologically nontrivial but equally optimal state at -4 strain (C = -1) with d11 = 11.01 pm_V-three times that of MoS2. Berry curvature analysis reveals that functionality arises from local orbital hybridization strength, while topology originates from its global phase distribution. This establishes a new paradigm for materials design, transforming static functional materials into dynamically tunable quantum platforms.

AI.tldr: 通过应变调控Tc吸附五-六硅烯单层的拓扑序和功能响应，实现从静态功能材料到动态可调量子平台的转变
AI.motivation: 传统方法中拓扑序在合成后是静态固定的，本研究旨在探索通过单一外部调控手段（应变）来独立调制拓扑序和功能响应，建立材料设计的新范式
AI.method: 结合第一性原理计算和紧束缚模型，通过双轴应变调控Tc-dxz与Si-px的动量空间轨道选择性杂化，分析Berry曲率分布
AI.result: 应变驱动完整的拓扑路径：C=1(0)→C=0(-2)→C=-1(-3到-4)→C=0金属态(-6)。在-2应变(C=0)时获得直接带隙(0.17 eV)和d11=8.34 pm/V，在-4应变(C=-1)时d11=11.01 pm/V，是MoS2的三倍
AI.conclusion: 功能性质源于局域轨道杂化强度，而拓扑性质源于其全局相位分布，这为将静态功能材料转变为动态可调量子平台提供了新范式

title: Collinear spin density wave state in distorted square-lattice GdNiSn$_4$
summary: We characterize the magnetic ground state of the newly synthesized lanthanide intermetallic GdNiSn$_4$ via resonant elastic x-ray scattering measurements. This compound forms distorted square nets of Gd that initially order magnetically below 23 K followed by a lower temperature transition at 16 K. Our scattering data identify the ground state order as a single-$q$ incommensurate, collinear order that slides towards a commensurate wave vector above the 16 K transition. Magnetic symmetry analysis combined with azimuthal dependence resolves the ground state magnetic structure as a moment-modulated spin density wave state with Gd moments oriented parallel to the in-plane a-axis. We discuss connections between the observed magnetic order and electronic properties in this square-net compound.

AI.tldr: 通过共振弹性X射线散射测量表征了GdNiSn₄的磁基态，发现其在23K以下形成单q非公度共线磁序，在16K以下转变为公度波矢的调制自旋密度波态。
AI.motivation: 研究新合成的镧系金属间化合物GdNiSn₄的磁基态特性，特别是其扭曲方形晶格结构中Gd原子的磁有序行为，以理解方形晶格化合物的磁性与电子性质之间的联系。
AI.method: 采用共振弹性X射线散射测量技术，结合磁对称性分析和方位角依赖性分析，确定了材料的磁结构。
AI.result: GdNiSn₄在23K以下开始磁有序，在16K以下发生相变，基态为单q非公度共线磁序，Gd磁矩沿面内a轴方向排列，形成调制自旋密度波态。
AI.conclusion: 成功表征了GdNiSn₄的磁基态结构，为理解方形晶格化合物的磁性与电子性质关系提供了重要实验依据。

title: Quantum Metric Senses A Persistent Spin Helix
summary: Persistent spin helices are a manifestation of symmetry-protected spin textures in systems with balanced spin-orbit coupling. They enable long-lived spin structures that are of interest for spintronics and coherent spin manipulation. The quantum metric has recently emerged as a promising tool for characterizing the geometric structure of quantum states. Here, we demonstrate that the quantum metric provides a sensitive geometric probe of the persistent spin helix. Within the Rashba-Dresselhaus Hamiltonian, we analytically evaluate the quantum metric components and uncover a divergent geometric contribution that emerges precisely at the persistent spin helix condition. We reveal that this divergence originates from a hidden line degeneracy that forms when the strengths of Rashba and Dresselhaus spin-orbit coupling become equal. We further study the role of higher-order cubic spin-orbit interactions and determine how these corrections regularize the geometric response and control the scaling behavior of the quantum metric. Our results establish quantum geometry as a powerful framework for identifying and characterizing persistent spin helices and related symmetry-protected spin textures.

AI.tldr: 量子度量作为探测持续自旋螺旋的几何探针，揭示其在Rashba-Dresselhaus哈密顿量中发散，源于隐藏的线简并性
AI.motivation: 持续自旋螺旋是自旋电子学和相干自旋操纵中重要的对称性保护自旋结构，量子度量作为表征量子态几何结构的新工具，需要探索其对持续自旋螺旋的探测能力
AI.method: 在Rashba-Dresselhaus哈密顿量中解析计算量子度量分量，研究其在持续自旋螺旋条件下的行为，分析高阶立方自旋轨道相互作用的调节作用
AI.result: 发现量子度量在持续自旋螺旋条件下出现发散几何贡献，这种发散源于Rashba和Dresselhaus自旋轨道耦合强度相等时形成的隐藏线简并性，高阶立方相互作用能正则化几何响应并控制量子度量的标度行为
AI.conclusion: 量子几何为识别和表征持续自旋螺旋及相关对称性保护自旋结构提供了强大框架，量子度量可作为探测这些结构的敏感几何探针

title: Spin Neural Network Potential for Magnetic Phase Transitions in Uranium Dioxide
summary: Uranium dioxide (UO2) is a prototypical nuclear fuel material, yet predicting its thermophysical properties across a wide temperature range remains challenging. One factor contributing to this difficulty is the complex magnetic ordering at low temperatures, where spin-orbit coupling produces strong coupling between spin and lattice degrees of freedom. Direct DFT simulations of magnetic phase transitions at finite temperatures are computationally prohibitive. Here, we develop a spin neural network potential (SpinNNP) that explicitly incorporates spin degrees of freedom together with spin-orbit coupling to describe the magnetic states of UO2.Reference datasets were generated using magnetic constrained DFT+U calculations with spin-orbit coupling, covering a wide range of non-collinear spin configurations. The SpinNNP accurately reproduces DFT energies, atomic forces, spin forces, and lattice constants. Machine learning molecular dynamics simulations with spin dynamics successfully capture the antiferromagnetic-paramagnetic transition. Although the predicted magnetic ground state differs from experiment due to known limitations of the underlying DFT description, the transition temperature obtained is of the correct order of magnitude compared with experiment. These results demonstrate that machine-learning potentials can enable large-scale spin-lattice simulations of actinide oxides and provide a practical route toward predictive modeling of complex magnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 开发了包含自旋自由度和自旋轨道耦合的SpinNNP势函数，用于模拟UO2的磁相变，成功预测了反铁磁-顺磁转变温度。
AI.motivation: UO2作为典型核燃料材料，其热物理性质预测困难，特别是低温下的复杂磁有序现象，传统DFT模拟磁相变计算成本过高。
AI.method: 开发自旋神经网络势函数(SpinNNP)，包含自旋自由度和自旋轨道耦合；使用磁约束DFT+U计算生成参考数据集，涵盖广泛非共线自旋构型；进行机器学习分子动力学模拟结合自旋动力学。
AI.result: SpinNNP准确复现DFT能量、原子力、自旋力和晶格常数；成功捕获反铁磁-顺磁相变；预测的转变温度与实验同数量级，但磁基态因DFT局限性而与实验存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习势函数能够实现锕系氧化物的大规模自旋-晶格模拟，为复杂磁性材料的预测建模提供了实用途径。

title: Revisiting the $J_1$-$J_2$ Heisenberg Model on a Triangular Lattice: Quasi-Degenerate Ground States and Phase Competition
summary: It is generally believed that the spin-$\tfrac{1}{2}$ triangular-lattice $J_1$-$J_2$ Heisenberg model hosts a quantum spin liquid in the intermediate regime between the $120^\circ$ and stripe ordered phases. Density matrix renormalization group studies on cylinders have consistently found two nearly degenerate ground states, commonly interpreted as distinct topological sectors. Using state-of-the-art matrix product state simulations on YC6 cylinders, we compare the static and dynamical properties of these two sectors at $J_2/J_1 = 0.125$. Noticeable differences appear already in static correlations; moreover, high-resolution dynamical structure factors reveal qualitatively distinct low-energy excitations. These results suggest that the two ground states cannot be understood as merely topologically distinct sectors of a gapped $\mathbb{Z}_2$ spin liquid.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过矩阵乘积态模拟发现，三角晶格J1-J2海森堡模型中的两个近简并基态不仅拓扑不同，其静态和动力学性质也存在显著差异，挑战了传统认为它们只是Z2自旋液体不同拓扑扇区的观点。
AI.motivation: 三角晶格J1-J2海森堡模型在120°有序相和条纹相之间的中间区域被认为存在量子自旋液体。以往密度矩阵重整化群研究在柱体几何中发现两个近简并基态，通常被解释为不同的拓扑扇区。本研究旨在深入探究这两个基态的本质差异。
AI.method: 使用最先进的矩阵乘积态模拟方法，在YC6柱体几何上研究J2/J1=0.125参数点。比较两个基态的静态和动力学性质，特别是通过高分辨率动力学结构因子分析低能激发。
AI.result: 两个基态在静态关联中已表现出明显差异，更重要的是，动力学结构因子揭示它们具有性质完全不同的低能激发。这些结果表明两个基态不能简单地理解为有能隙Z2自旋液体的不同拓扑扇区。
AI.conclusion: 三角晶格J1-J2海森堡模型中的两个近简并基态具有本质不同的物理性质，超越了传统拓扑扇区的简单解释，这对理解该模型量子自旋液体相的性质提出了新的挑战。

title: Layer-Dependent Orbital Magnetization in Graphene-Haldane Heterostructures
summary: Rhombohedral multilayer graphene (RMG) proximity-coupled to a Haldane substrate provides a platform to investigate the interplay between band topology, layer number, and electric-field control of orbital magnetism. Using a tight-binding model and the modern theory of orbital magnetization, we study the layer-dependent magnetic response in bilayer, trilayer, and tetralayer graphene under Haldane proximity. While monolayer graphene develops a global topological gap with quantized magnetization slope, multilayer systems remain metallic due to protected low-energy bands associated with unperturbed sublattices. Despite the absence of a global gap, finite valley-contrasting Berry curvature produces non-trivial layer-dependent Chern numbers. We decompose the total orbital magnetization into self-rotation ($M_{\mathrm{SR}}$) and center-of-mass ($M_C$) contributions, revealing their distinct behaviors across doping and applied interlayer bias. In bilayer graphene, magnetization remains negative and monotonic. Remarkably, trilayer and tetralayer graphene display a bias-induced sign reversal of orbital magnetization beyond critical thresholds ($Δ\simeq -55$ meV for 3LG, $-50$ meV for 4LG) in the hole-doped regime, a feature completely absent in the bilayer. The effect persists across both hole and electron doping, demonstrating that layer count serves as a key tuning parameter for orbital magnetism. Our findings establish topologically proximitized multilayer graphene as a versatile platform for electric-field-manipulable orbitronic and valleytronic devices.

AI.tldr: 多层菱面体石墨烯与Haldane衬底耦合，研究层数、电场对轨道磁性的调控。单层有全局拓扑能隙和量子化磁化斜率，多层保持金属性但有非平庸层依赖陈数。三层和四层石墨烯在空穴掺杂区出现偏压诱导的轨道磁化符号反转，而双层没有此现象。
AI.motivation: 研究菱面体多层石墨烯与Haldane衬底耦合系统中，能带拓扑、层数和电场控制对轨道磁性的相互作用，探索层数作为轨道磁性调控关键参数的可能性。
AI.method: 使用紧束缚模型和现代轨道磁化理论，研究双层、三层和四层石墨烯在Haldane邻近效应下的层依赖磁响应，将总轨道磁化分解为自旋转和质心运动贡献。
AI.result: 单层石墨烯具有全局拓扑能隙和量子化磁化斜率；多层系统保持金属性但有非平庸层依赖陈数；三层和四层石墨烯在空穴掺杂区出现偏压诱导的轨道磁化符号反转（临界阈值约-55meV和-50meV），而双层石墨烯没有此现象。
AI.conclusion: 层数是调控轨道磁性的关键参数，拓扑邻近多层石墨烯为电场可操纵的轨道电子学和谷电子学器件提供了多功能平台。

title: A defect in diamond with millisecond-scale spin relaxation time at room temperature
summary: Spin defects in diamond are promising platforms for quantum sensing. The longest electron spin relaxation times ($T_1$) at room temperature for solid-state defects are observed in nitrogen vacancy centers in diamond, which can reach 6.67 ms, and substitutional nitrogen ("P1 centers") in diamond, which exhibit a $T_1$ of 2 ms. No other solid-state defect has exhibited millisecond-scale spin relaxation times at room temperature thus far. Here, we characterize the spin properties of the WAR5 defect in diamond with pulsed electron spin resonance. The observed $T_1$ is one of the longest for solid-state spin defects: 0.97(27) ms at room temperature and 14.38(19) min at 4 K. The observed coherence time ($T_2$) is 246(7) $μ$s, which can be extended to 6.49(34) ms at 4 K with dynamical decoupling. Furthermore, we demonstrate optical spin polarization with a range of wavelengths from 405 nm to 500 nm and propose potential zero-phonon line candidates.

AI.tldr: WAR5缺陷在金刚石中展现出极长的自旋弛豫时间（室温0.97ms，4K时14.38分钟）和相干时间（室温246μs，4K时通过动态解耦可达6.49ms），同时具有405-500nm范围内的光学自旋极化能力。
AI.motivation: 目前只有金刚石中的氮空位中心和P1中心在室温下能达到毫秒级的自旋弛豫时间，其他固态缺陷尚未实现这一性能。研究WAR5缺陷的自旋特性，探索其作为量子传感平台的潜力。
AI.method: 使用脉冲电子自旋共振技术表征WAR5缺陷的自旋特性，测量自旋弛豫时间T1和相干时间T2，在4K温度下应用动态解耦技术，并测试405-500nm波长范围内的光学自旋极化能力。
AI.result: WAR5缺陷表现出极长的自旋弛豫时间：室温下0.97(27)ms，4K时14.38(19)分钟；相干时间室温下246(7)μs，4K时通过动态解耦可延长至6.49(34)ms；同时具有405-500nm范围内的光学自旋极化能力。
AI.conclusion: WAR5缺陷是金刚石中具有优异自旋特性的新型缺陷，其极长的自旋弛豫时间和相干时间使其成为量子传感的有力候选平台，光学自旋极化特性进一步增强了其应用潜力。

title: Understanding thermal and quantum fluctuations in extended Kitaev-Yao-Lee spin-orbital model
summary: Building upon the spin-1/2 Kitaev model on a honeycomb lattice, the Yao-Lee spin-orbital model provides exactly solvable quantum spin liquids with potentially better stability against perturbations due to the additional degree of freedom. Recently, the microscopic mechanism underlying the Yao-Lee interaction in honeycomb materials has been uncovered, leading to an extended Kitaev-Yao-Lee spin-orbital model when the celebrated Kugel-Khomskii interaction is included. Numerical studies of this model have identified various disordered phases, including a broad region of the nematic phase that is reminiscent of a spin-orbital liquid. Here, we investigate the origin and stability of this nematic phase via thermal and quantum fluctuations using classical Monte Carlo simulations and a generalized spin wave theory appropriate for the spin-orbital model. We demonstrate that the additional spin-orbital degree of freedom gives rise to strong thermal and quantum fluctuations in spin-orbital models, providing insight into the emergence of disordered phases.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过经典蒙特卡洛模拟和广义自旋波理论，探讨了扩展Kitaev-Yao-Lee自旋轨道模型中向列相的起源和稳定性，发现额外的自旋轨道自由度导致强热和量子涨落，从而促进无序相的出现。
AI.motivation: Yao-Lee自旋轨道模型提供了具有更好稳定性的精确可解量子自旋液体，但包含Kugel-Khomskii相互作用的扩展Kitaev-Yao-Lee模型中出现的向列相（类似自旋轨道液体）的起源和稳定性尚不清楚。
AI.method: 使用经典蒙特卡洛模拟和适用于自旋轨道模型的广义自旋波理论，研究热涨落和量子涨落对向列相的影响。
AI.result: 额外的自旋轨道自由度导致自旋轨道模型中产生强烈的热涨落和量子涨落，这解释了无序相（特别是向列相）的出现机制。
AI.conclusion: 自旋轨道模型中的额外自由度通过增强热和量子涨落，促进了无序相的形成，为理解自旋轨道液体等奇异量子态提供了新视角。

title: All-in-plane image sensors free from readout integrated circuits
summary: High resolution image sensors require electrical access to each individual pixel for signal readout. Such access is especially challenging for ultra-miniaturized pixels, for heterogeneously integrated sensing and readout layers in long-wavelength detectors, and for novel light-sensing materials with unestablished integration to silicon chips. Here, we introduce and experimentally validate a novel imaging approach that does not require electrical connections to individual pixels. The sensor matrix involves photoresistive pixels connected neighbor-to-neighbor and packed into a rectangular lattice. The signal readout is based on electrical impedance tomography applied to the photoresistance: the photovoltage is measured at the matrix boundary at various positions of injected bias current, and the image is reconstructed algorithmically. We present experimental validations for moderate-size infrared imagers based on multilayer graphene (24 pixels) and amorphous vanadium oxide (264 pixels). The reconstruction procedure is mathematically stable, sustainable to variations of pixel resistivity and photosensitivity, and its complexity is that of linear system solution. The proposed method enables unprecedented architecture simplification of imaging devices.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需像素电连接的新型成像方法，通过边界电学测量和阻抗层析算法重建图像
AI.motivation: 传统成像传感器需要每个像素单独电连接，这在超小型像素、异质集成传感层和新型光敏材料中面临挑战
AI.method: 采用光阻像素邻接连接的矩形阵列，通过边界注入偏置电流并测量光电压，利用电阻抗层析算法重建图像
AI.result: 实验验证了基于多层石墨烯（24像素）和非晶氧化钒（264像素）的中等尺寸红外成像器，重建算法稳定且复杂度低
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著简化成像设备架构，为新型成像系统设计提供新途径

title: Impact of Layer Structure and Strain on Morphology and Electronic Properties of InAs Quantum Wells on InP (001)
summary: High-quality InAs quantum wells grown on InP are a promising platform for topological quantum information processing due to their large g-factor, strong Rashba spin-orbit interaction, and their compatibility with in-situ-deposited superconductors. In this work, we investigate InAs/InGaAs quantum wells grown on InP (001) wafers, focusing on how the layer structure and strain influence the electronic properties and surface morphology. By combining quantum transport measurements with atomic force microscopy, we show that the layer design predominantly affects the mobility anisotropy, which aligns well with the surface morphology. Surface characterization further reveals the mechanism of quantum well collapse when the layer thickness exceeds the strain limit. In addition, transport measurements demonstrate that quantum confinement has a clear impact on band nonparabolicity.

AI.tldr: 研究InP衬底上InAs量子阱的生长特性，分析层结构、应变对电子性质及表面形貌的影响，揭示量子阱塌陷机制和量子限制对能带非抛物性的作用。
AI.motivation: InAs量子阱在InP衬底上具有大g因子、强Rashba自旋轨道耦合和原位超导沉积兼容性，是拓扑量子信息处理的有前景平台。需要研究层结构和应变如何影响其电子性质和表面形貌。
AI.method: 结合量子输运测量和原子力显微镜，研究InP(001)衬底上生长的InAs/InGaAs量子阱。通过表面表征分析量子阱塌陷机制，通过输运测量研究量子限制效应。
AI.result: 层设计主要影响迁移率各向异性，与表面形貌一致；当层厚度超过应变极限时会发生量子阱塌陷；量子限制对能带非抛物性有明显影响。
AI.conclusion: InP衬底上InAs量子阱的电子性质和表面形貌受层结构和应变显著影响，量子限制效应在能带工程中起重要作用，为拓扑量子信息处理器件设计提供指导。

title: Averaging Molecular Dynamics simulations to study the slow-strain rate behavior of metals
summary:
The application of molecular dynamics (MD) simulations to quasistatic loading is severely limited by the large separation between atomic vibration timescales and experimentally relevant deformation rates. In this work we employ the Practical Time Averaging (PTA) framework to overcome this limitation and enable atomistic simulations of crystalline solids under quasistatic loading conditions. PTA exploits the intrinsic separation of timescales by defining slow variables as time-averaged observables of the fast atomistic dynamics and their evolution on the slow loading timescale, thereby avoiding explicit integration of the fast dynamics.
  Using this approach, we simulate uniaxial deformation, in both tension and compression, of 4 to 20 nm cubic specimens of face centered cubic aluminum nanocrystals at applied strain rates approaching quasistatic conditions. We define slow variables as the averaged kinetic energy, potential energy, and normal stress in the loading direction, and track their evolution on the slow timescale. The stress-strain curves show yielding close to the theoretical stress for homogeneous nucleation, followed by successive load drops and rises caused by dislocation nucleation, motion, and exit from free surfaces. The "smaller is harder" effect is evident from the stress-strain response and from the variation of yield stress with sample size. Serrations in the response are more pronounced for smaller samples. The effects of applied strain rate and initial temperature are also studied. The method also captures the evolution of intricate dislocation microstructures on the slow timescale by tracking time-averaged atomic positions. The PTA framework enables simulations at strain rates several orders of magnitude lower than those accessible to conventional MD, demonstrating significant speedup in computational time while retaining full atomistic resolution.

AI.tldr: 提出Practical Time Averaging (PTA)框架，通过时间平均方法克服分子动力学模拟中原子振动时间尺度与实验变形速率之间的巨大差距，实现准静态加载条件下晶体固体的原子尺度模拟。
AI.motivation: 分子动力学模拟在准静态加载应用中受到严重限制，因为原子振动时间尺度与实验相关的变形速率之间存在巨大分离。需要一种方法能够克服这一限制，实现准静态加载条件下的原子尺度模拟。
AI.method: 采用Practical Time Averaging (PTA)框架，将慢变量定义为快速原子动力学的时间平均可观测量，并跟踪它们在慢加载时间尺度上的演化，避免显式积分快速动力学。模拟了面心立方铝纳米晶体在拉伸和压缩下的单轴变形。
AI.result: 应力-应变曲线显示屈服接近均匀成核的理论应力，随后由位错成核、运动和自由表面退出引起的连续载荷下降和上升。观察到"越小越硬"效应，较小样品的响应锯齿更明显。该方法能够捕获慢时间尺度上复杂位错微结构的演化。
AI.conclusion: PTA框架使应变率比传统MD可访问的低几个数量级的模拟成为可能，在保持全原子分辨率的同时显著提高了计算时间效率，为研究准静态加载条件下的材料行为提供了有力工具。

title: Optical manipulation of valley coherence via Landau level transitions in black phosphorus and WTe2 monolayers
summary: Valley coherence is of great significance for exploring fundamental quantum phenomena and developing next-generation valleytronic devices. Herein, we theoretically investigate the valley quantum interference engineered by inter-Landau level (LL) transitions in black phosphorus (BP) and WTe2 monolayers. In contrast to the non-Landau-quantized regime, valley quantum interference is enhanced by over 20-fold, or even significantly stronger, in virtue of striking anisotropic environment. Such anisotropy originates from the distinct electron transition probabilities along the armchair and zigzag directions of BP and WTe2 monolayers. Especially, BP is capable of more effectively strengthening the valley quantum interference response due to its greater directional disparity in electron transition probabilities. The interference fringes also present distinct spectral profiles (e.g., different dip and peak numbers in one interference period) owing to different transition selection rules in BP and WTe2 monolayers. In spite of these discrepancies, normalized interference intensities follow two exponential functions of magnetic field and Landau level index for all the transitions δn = n'- n = -4, -2, 0, +2, +4 (where n and n' indicate the LL indexes of valence and conduction bands, respectively), and the interference spectra exhibit C2 rotational symmetry about the crystallographic azimuthal angle of 90°.

AI.tldr: 该理论研究黑磷和WTe2单层中由朗道能级间跃迁调控的谷量子干涉，发现各向异性环境可增强干涉效应20倍以上，干涉强度随磁场和朗道能级指数呈指数规律变化。
AI.motivation: 谷相干性对探索基本量子现象和发展下一代谷电子器件具有重要意义。研究旨在探索各向异性材料中朗道能级间跃迁对谷量子干涉的调控作用。
AI.method: 理论研究了黑磷和WTe2单层材料中由朗道能级间跃迁调控的谷量子干涉。分析了沿扶手椅和锯齿方向的电子跃迁概率差异，以及不同跃迁选择规则（δn = -4, -2, 0, +2, +4）对干涉条纹的影响。
AI.result: 与非朗道量子化区域相比，谷量子干涉增强了20倍以上。黑磷因其更大的方向性差异能更有效地增强谷量子干涉响应。干涉光谱在90°晶向方位角处呈现C2旋转对称性，归一化干涉强度随磁场和朗道能级指数呈指数函数变化。
AI.conclusion: 各向异性材料中的朗道能级间跃迁可显著增强谷量子干涉，为探索量子现象和开发高性能谷电子器件提供了新途径。黑磷和WTe2单层材料在谷相干调控方面具有独特优势。

title: Microstructural origins of energy storage during plastic deformation of 310S TWIP steel
summary: The microstructural mechanisms governing energy storage during plastic deformation of twinning-induced plasticity (TWIP) steels remain insufficiently understood, particularly under conditions of strain localization. This study provides a crystallographic-scale interpretation of energy storage in 310S TWIP steel exhibiting complex deformation mechanisms. Electron backscatter diffraction (EBSD) was used to characterize the evolution of local crystallographic orientation and microtexture during uniaxial tensile deformation using two complementary approaches: tracking the same surface region at successive strain levels and analysing regions corresponding to known local plastic strain. Deformation was initially dominated by dislocation slip, while twinning activity increased significantly beyond an equivalent plastic strain of approximately 0.3. Progressive deformation produced pronounced lattice rotations and the development of a dual-fibre texture consisting of a dominant 111 parallel to RD component and a secondary 100 parallel to RD component associated with deformation twinning. Correlation with previously quantified energy storage behaviour obtained from coupled digital image correlation and infrared thermography measurements reveals that intensified twinning and texture evolution in strain-localized regions are accompanied by a marked reduction in the energy storage rate. The results indicate that twin-matrix refinement and lattice rotation progressively reduce the material's capacity to store deformation energy and create favourable conditions for shear-band-mediated deformation.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过EBSD技术揭示了310S TWIP钢在拉伸变形过程中能量存储的微观机制，发现孪晶活动和织构演化会降低能量存储速率，促进剪切带形成。
AI.motivation: 目前对TWIP钢塑性变形过程中能量存储的微观机制，特别是在应变局部化条件下的理解仍不充分。需要从晶体学尺度解释TWIP钢在复杂变形机制下的能量存储行为。
AI.method: 采用电子背散射衍射(EBSD)技术，通过两种互补方法表征单轴拉伸变形过程中的局部晶体取向和微观织构演化：1) 跟踪同一表面区域在不同应变水平的变化；2) 分析已知局部塑性应变对应的区域。结合先前通过数字图像相关和红外热成像测量的能量存储数据。
AI.result: 变形初期以位错滑移为主，当等效塑性应变超过约0.3时，孪晶活动显著增加。渐进变形产生明显的晶格旋转，并形成由主导的111∥RD组分和次要的100∥RD组分组成的双纤维织构。应变局部化区域中孪晶强化和织构演化伴随着能量存储速率的显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 孪晶-基体细化和晶格旋转逐渐降低了材料存储变形能量的能力，并为剪切带介导的变形创造了有利条件。这为理解TWIP钢的能量存储机制和变形行为提供了重要见解。

title: Non-local effects in charge and energy transport with dissipative electrodes
summary: Recent advances in nano-thermometry motivate the extension of the Landauer-Büttiker scattering theory as to include the non-local dissipation associated with charge transport. Such a program is implemented by describing the inelastic scattering in the connecting electrodes within an electrostatically self-consistent scheme. The restriction to quasi-one-dimensional geometries, weak excitation and low temperature allows to obtain general expressions of the current density and the dissipated power, valid in different regimes, for the cases of an energy-independent mean-free-path or an energy-independent relaxation-rate. In particular, the dissipation asymmetry at both sides of a nano-device and the conditions for observing heating spots with a local maximum of the dissipated power are formulated in terms of the key parameters that define the nano-device and its environment.

AI.tldr: 扩展Landauer-Büttiker散射理论以包含电荷传输中的非局域耗散，在静电自洽框架下描述电极中的非弹性散射，推导出电流密度和耗散功率的通用表达式。
AI.motivation: 纳米测温技术的进展需要扩展传统散射理论来处理电荷传输中的非局域耗散效应，特别是在纳米器件中电极的非弹性散射过程。
AI.method: 采用静电自洽方案描述电极中的非弹性散射，限制在准一维几何、弱激发和低温条件下，推导出适用于不同区域（能量无关平均自由程或能量无关弛豫率）的电流密度和耗散功率表达式。
AI.result: 获得了电流密度和耗散功率的通用表达式，能够描述纳米器件两侧的耗散不对称性，并确定了观察局部最大加热点的条件，这些条件由纳米器件及其环境的关键参数决定。
AI.conclusion: 成功扩展了Landauer-Büttiker散射理论以包含非局域耗散，为纳米器件的热效应分析提供了理论框架，能够预测耗散不对称性和局部加热现象。

title: The role of austenite twins on variant selection during decomposition in low carbon steels
summary: Thermomechanical Controlled Processing (TMCP) is widely used to control the microstructure and properties of linepipe or high strength low alloy steels (HSLA). These steels are often joined by welding and used in demanding environments such as the Arctic. In these materials, the thermal path the steel experiences is critical for understanding microstructural evolution during processing. A key step is the solid-state phase transformation during cooling from the high-temperature austenite to the room-temperature microstructure which significantly influences the final mechanical properties. Specifically, the population of different variants and grain shapes that form affect the types and morphology of the grains, and grain boundary network which influence strength and toughness of the final component. In this paper, we apply 3D microscopy using a Xe-plasma focussed ion beam scanning electron microscope (pFIB-SEM) which is equipped with electron backscatter diffraction (EBSD) in a static configuration to characterize the room temperature microstructure of a steel sample, and then use a '2.5D' prior austenite grain (PAG) reconstruction code to explore the relationship between the austenite phase and the room temperature microstructure. A significant result for the present work is the collection, and analysis, of data from a large volume (150 x 150 x 100 μm3, with a (200 nm)3 voxel size) which enables analysis of a complete prior austenite grain. Analysis of variants within this grain demonstrates that high-temperature twin boundaries likely govern variant selection and grain growth in the child microstructure. This suggests opportunities to engineer novel microstructures by controlling the high-temperature grain boundary character.

AI.tldr: 利用3D显微镜和PAG重建技术研究TMCP钢中奥氏体到室温组织的相变关系，发现高温孪晶界控制变体选择和晶粒生长
AI.motivation: TMCP钢在焊接和极地等苛刻环境下使用，其热路径对微观组织演变至关重要。理解奥氏体到室温组织的固态相变对最终力学性能有重要影响，特别是不同变体、晶粒形状和晶界网络对强度和韧性的影响。
AI.method: 使用配备EBSD的Xe等离子体聚焦离子束扫描电镜（pFIB-SEM）进行3D显微分析，采用静态配置表征钢样品的室温微观组织，然后应用"2.5D"原始奥氏体晶粒（PAG）重建代码探索奥氏体相与室温组织之间的关系。
AI.result: 收集并分析了150×150×100μm³的大体积数据（体素尺寸200nm³），能够分析完整的原始奥氏体晶粒。分析表明高温孪晶界很可能控制子组织中的变体选择和晶粒生长。
AI.conclusion: 通过控制高温晶界特征来设计新型微观结构具有潜在机会，高温孪晶界在相变过程中起关键调控作用。

title: Microwave response of electrically driven spins in a three-qubit quantum processor
summary: In electric dipole spin resonance (EDSR), a single spin is electrically driven in the field gradient produced by a micromagnet.
